title: Raman response in superconducting multiorbital systems with application to nickelates
summary: The recent discovery of high-$T_c$ superconductivity in pressurized and thin film nickelates is nowadays one of the most relevant and active topics in solid-state physics. The origin of superconductivity together with the relevance of multiorbital physics are highly discussed issues in this field. Knowledge of the size of the gap and its symmetry is of fundamental interest to uncover the superconducting mechanism at play in the nickelates. Electronic Raman scattering is a powerful tool to investigate the main characteristics of the gap. Here, we investigate the Raman response in the superconducting phase for three different models: Two-orbital models, including $d_{x^2-y^2}$ and $d_{z^2}$ orbitals, with one and two layers; as well as a bilayer model with the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital as the only active one. For each of these models, we consider different pairing symmetries and determine their characteristic fingerprints in the Raman response. For the two-orbital models, we perform full multiorbital calculations including interorbital and intraorbital scattering, and compare the results with those obtained using the additive Raman response where each band is considered separately. Our results should be useful for discussing the minimal model for superconductivity and its pairing symmetry in nickelates. The obtained results and discussions, as well as the presented formalism, are also of general interest for other multiorbital systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过电子拉曼散射研究镍酸盐超导体的能隙特征，分析了三种不同模型（双轨道单层、双轨道双层、单轨道双层）在不同配对对称性下的拉曼响应特征，为确定镍酸盐超导的最小模型和配对对称性提供理论依据。
AI.motivation: 镍酸盐中高压和薄膜形式的高温超导性是当前凝聚态物理的热点问题。理解超导机制、多轨道物理的作用以及能隙大小和对称性对于揭示镍酸盐超导本质至关重要。电子拉曼散射是研究能隙特征的有力工具。
AI.method: 研究三种不同模型：1) 包含dx²-y²和dz²轨道的双轨道单层模型；2) 包含相同轨道的双轨道双层模型；3) 仅含dx²-y²轨道的单轨道双层模型。对每种模型考虑不同配对对称性，计算其拉曼响应特征。对于双轨道模型，进行包含轨道间和轨道内散射的全多轨道计算，并与各能带单独考虑的加性拉曼响应进行比较。
AI.result: 确定了不同配对对称性在拉曼响应中的特征指纹。对于双轨道模型，全多轨道计算与加性拉曼响应方法的结果存在差异，表明轨道间相互作用的重要性。研究结果为讨论镍酸盐超导的最小模型和配对对称性提供了理论依据。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过系统分析不同模型和配对对称性的拉曼响应特征，为确定镍酸盐超导机制提供了重要理论工具。所得结果、讨论以及提出的形式化方法对其他多轨道系统也具有普遍意义。

title: Nanoscale electrothermal-switch superconducting diode for electrically programmable superconducting circuits
summary: Superconducting diodes enable dissipationless directional transport, yet achieving electrical tunability and scalability remains a major challenge for circuit-level integration. Here, we demonstrate an electrothermal-switch superconducting diode in which a gate-controlled nanoscale hotspot dynamically breaks inversion symmetry in a superconducting nanowire. This mechanism gives rise to two coexisting nonreciprocal transport regimes-one associated with a nonreciprocal superconducting-to-normal transition and the other with ratchet-like vortex dynamics-both originating from the same electrothermal-switch process. The diode exhibits efficiencies up to 42% and 60% for the two regimes, respectively, and can be electrically switched on, off, or reversed in polarity in situ by applying a small gate current. These capabilities enable programmable superconducting circuits that realize electrically reconfigurable full-wave and half-wave rectification. The lithography-compatible design, high performance, and gate-controlled functionality establish a scalable platform for programmable superconducting electronics and hybrid quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 研究人员开发了一种电热开关超导二极管，通过门控纳米热点动态破坏超导纳米线中的反演对称性，实现了高达60%的效率，并可在原位电控开关和极性反转。
AI.motivation: 超导二极管能够实现无耗散定向传输，但实现电可调性和可扩展性仍然是电路级集成的主要挑战。需要开发一种可扩展、可电控的超导二极管平台。
AI.method: 采用电热开关机制，通过门控纳米热点动态破坏超导纳米线中的反演对称性。这种方法产生了两种共存的非互易传输机制：非互易超导-正常态转变和类似棘轮的涡旋动力学。
AI.result: 二极管效率分别达到42%和60%，可通过施加小门电流原位电控开关和极性反转。实现了可编程超导电路，包括可电重构的全波和半波整流。该设计与光刻兼容，具有高性能和门控功能。
AI.conclusion: 这种电热开关超导二极管为可编程超导电子学和混合量子系统建立了一个可扩展的平台，解决了超导二极管电可调性和可扩展性的关键挑战。

title: Charge-4e/6e superconductivity and chiral metal from 3D chiral superconductor
summary: Unconventional superconductivity (SC) characterized by multi-fermion orderings has attracted substantial attention. However, previous studies have largely focused on 2D systems or 3D systems with effective 2D symmetries. Here, we investigate the vestigial phases arising from thermal fluctuations of chiral SC in 3D systems governed by the cubic $O_h$ point group. By constructing low-energy effective Hamiltonians via Ginzburg-Landau analysis and conducting Monte Carlo simulations, we systematically investigate the phase fluctuations of chiral orders within the $E_g$ and $T_{2g}/T_{1u}$ irreducible representations (IRRPs). We identify a phase diagram topology different from 2D counterparts, where the multi-phase intersection manifests as a tetracritical point rather than the triple point typically found in 2D systems. We elucidate the evolution of these phases under thermal fluctuations. Our findings reveal that for both $E_g$ and $T_{2g}/T_{1u}$ IRRPs, the primary chiral orders could melt into a chiral metallic phase across specific parameter regimes. Moreover, for the $E_g$ IRRP, phase fluctuation could also induce a charge-$4e$ phase under certain regime, while for the $T_{2g}$ and $T_{1u}$ IRRPs, it leads to a higher-order charge-$6e$ SC state. Our work paves the way for exploring exotic vestigial orders driven by non-trivial 3D crystalline symmetries.

AI.tldr: 研究三维立方对称系统中手性超导的热涨落导致的残留相，发现相图拓扑结构与二维系统不同，存在四临界点而非三临界点，并揭示了手性金属相和更高阶电荷凝聚相的形成。
AI.motivation: 以往对多费米子有序超导的研究主要集中在二维系统或具有有效二维对称性的三维系统，缺乏对三维立方对称系统中手性超导热涨落导致的残留相的深入理解。
AI.method: 通过Ginzburg-Landau分析构建低能有效哈密顿量，并进行蒙特卡洛模拟，系统研究E_g和T_{2g}/T_{1u}不可约表示下手性有序的相涨落。
AI.result: 发现三维系统的相图拓扑结构与二维对应物不同，表现为四临界点而非三临界点；对于E_g和T_{2g}/T_{1u}不可约表示，手性有序可在特定参数区间熔化形成手性金属相；E_g表示下相涨落可诱导电荷-4e相，而T_{2g}和T_{1u}表示下则导致更高阶的电荷-6e超导态。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为探索由非平凡三维晶体对称性驱动的奇异残留有序相开辟了新途径，揭示了三维立方对称系统中手性超导热涨落的独特相行为。

title: Kinetic instability and superconductivity in Li$_2$AuH$_6$ and Li$_2$AgH$_6$ at ambient pressure
summary: Li$_2$AuH$_6$ and Li$_2$AgH$_6$ have been proposed as promising candidates for high-temperature superconductors under ambient pressure. While previous studies confirm the dynamic stability of these two thermodynamically unstable systems, their kinetic stability remains to be verified. In this work, we use path integral molecular dynamics simulations to examine the kinetic stability of Li$_2$AuH$_6$ and Li$_2$AgH$_6$ under ambient pressure. We find both compounds are kinetically unstable. Li$_2$AgH$_6$ undergoes lattice collapse, whereas Li$_2$AuH$_6$ retains a stable fluorite-type Li-Au sublattice, but hydrogen atoms partially dimerize into molecules and diffuse within the host lattice. Using the stochastic path-integral approach, which is a nonperturbative approach applicable to systems with diffusive atoms, we investigate the superconductivity of Li$_2$AuH$_6$ in this state. We predict a superconducting transition temperature of 22 K, well below earlier predictions, due to the low density of states at the Fermi level caused by the collapse of hydrogen sublattice and hydrogen dimerization.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过路径积分分子动力学模拟发现Li₂AuH₆和Li₂AgH₆在常压下动力学不稳定，其中Li₂AuH₆的氢原子部分二聚化并扩散，导致超导转变温度仅为22K，远低于先前预测。
AI.motivation: 先前研究确认Li₂AuH₆和Li₂AgH₆在常压下热力学不稳定但动力学稳定，但它们的动力学稳定性尚未验证，这对于评估其作为高温超导体的实际应用潜力至关重要。
AI.method: 采用路径积分分子动力学模拟评估Li₂AuH₆和Li₂AgH₆的动力学稳定性，并使用适用于扩散原子系统的非微扰方法——随机路径积分方法研究Li₂AuH₆在这种状态下的超导性。
AI.result: 两种化合物在常压下都动力学不稳定：Li₂AgH₆发生晶格坍塌，而Li₂AuH₆保持稳定的萤石型Li-Au亚晶格，但氢原子部分二聚化成分子并在主晶格内扩散。Li₂AuH₆在这种状态下的超导转变温度为22K。
AI.conclusion: Li₂AuH₆和Li₂AgH₆在常压下动力学不稳定，这限制了它们作为高温超导体的实际应用潜力。氢亚晶格坍塌和氢二聚化导致费米能级态密度降低，使得超导转变温度远低于先前预测。

title: Towards grounded autonomous research: an end-to-end LLM mini research loop on published computational physics
summary: Recent autonomous LLM agents have demonstrated end-to-end automation of machine-learning research. Real-world physical science is intrinsically harder, requiring deep reasoning bounded by physical truth and, because real systems are too complex to study in isolation, almost always built on existing literature. We focus on the smallest meaningful unit of such research, a mini research loop in which an agent reads a paper, reproduces it, critiques it, and extends it. We test this loop in two complementary regimes: scale and depth. At scale, across 111 open-access computational physics papers, an agent autonomously runs the read-plan-compute-compare loop and, without being asked to critique, raises substantive concerns on ~42% of papers - 97.7% of which require execution to surface. In depth, for one Nature Communications paper on multiscale simulation of a 2D-material MOSFET, the agent runs new calculations missing from the original and produces, unsupervised, a publishable Comment -- composed, figured, typeset, and PDF-iterated -- that revises the paper's headline conclusion.

AI.tldr: LLM代理在物理科学研究中实现自主的"阅读-计划-计算-比较"循环，能够大规模分析论文并发现实质性缺陷，还能深度扩展研究并生成可发表的评论。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的物理科学研究比机器学习研究更复杂，需要基于物理真理的深度推理，并且几乎总是建立在现有文献基础上。需要测试LLM代理能否在物理科学领域进行有意义的自主研究。
AI.method: 设计了"迷你研究循环"：代理阅读论文、复现研究、批判分析、扩展研究。在两个互补的机制中测试：1) 规模测试：对111篇开放获取的计算物理论文运行"阅读-计划-计算-比较"循环；2) 深度测试：针对一篇Nature Communications论文，代理运行原始论文缺失的新计算，并生成可发表的评论。
AI.result: 在规模测试中，代理自主发现了约42%论文的实质性缺陷，其中97.7%需要通过执行才能发现。在深度测试中，代理成功运行了原始论文缺失的新计算，并生成了可发表的评论（包含撰写、图表、排版和PDF迭代），修正了论文的主要结论。
AI.conclusion: LLM代理能够在物理科学领域进行有意义的自主研究，既能大规模识别文献中的缺陷，又能深度扩展研究并产生新的科学见解，展示了在科学发现中作为研究助手的潜力。

title: Perspective: Measuring physical entropy out of equilibrium
comment: Perspective article for the Phys Rev E collection "SPLASHY Roadmap"
summary: Entropy is one of the key thermodynamic variables reflecting changes in the state of matter. Unlike other thermodynamic variables, it is well-defined also for nonequilibrium steady states through its relation to information. Applying this relation to physical systems is an ongoing challenge, as it requires knowledge of microscopic high-dimensional continuous distributions which is generally unattainable. A set of new approaches for the measurement of entropy in nonequilibrium steady or absorbing states have been developed and successfully applied to identify dynamic structures and transitions in diverse systems, ranging from jammed packings to swarming bacteria. We briefly review these approaches, emphasizing why applications to physical systems, including those out of equilibrium, is substantially different from the general statistical challenge of entropy estimation and inference. We point at promising current and future directions.

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了非平衡稳态或吸收态中熵测量的新方法，强调物理系统应用与一般统计熵估计的不同之处
AI.motivation: 熵是反映物质状态变化的关键热力学变量，在非平衡稳态中通过信息关系也有明确定义。然而，将这一关系应用于物理系统面临挑战，因为需要了解通常无法获得的微观高维连续分布
AI.method: 开发了一套测量非平衡稳态或吸收态熵的新方法，这些方法已成功应用于从堵塞堆积到细菌集群等多种系统中识别动态结构和相变
AI.result: 这些方法成功识别了多种系统中的动态结构和相变，证明了在物理系统中测量熵的可行性
AI.conclusion: 物理系统（包括非平衡系统）的熵测量与一般统计熵估计有本质区别，指出了当前和未来有前景的研究方向

title: Inverse Design of Inorganic Compounds with Generative AI
summary: Machine learning is revolutionizing chemistry. Beyond the value of predictive models accelerating virtual screening, generative AI aims at enabling inverse design, reversing the compound-to-property prediction paradigm into property-to-compound generation. Chemists now have access to a rich AI toolbox for organic chemistry, including drug discovery. However, the application of these methods to inorganic compounds remains limited by the challenges posed by their intrinsic nature. This Review analyzes how these challenges have been addressed, considering widely diverse systems ranging from molecules to crystals, including transition metal complexes and microporous materials. The analysis focuses on how generative AI methods have evolved towards data-representation-model pipelines that address the full complexity of inorganic compounds, including their chemical composition, geometry, symmetry, and electronic structure. Future directions, like benchmark standardization and the development of synthesizability metrics, are also discussed.

AI.tldr: 这篇综述分析了生成式AI在无机化学中的应用进展，探讨了如何通过数据-表示-模型管道处理无机化合物的复杂性，并讨论了未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 机器学习正在革新化学领域，但生成式AI在无机化合物中的应用仍然有限，主要受限于无机化合物固有的复杂性（化学组成、几何结构、对称性、电子结构等）。需要分析如何应对这些挑战。
AI.method: 综述分析了从分子到晶体、过渡金属配合物和多孔材料等广泛无机系统中生成式AI方法的应用，重点关注数据-表示-模型管道如何解决无机化合物的复杂性。
AI.result: 生成式AI方法已经发展出能够处理无机化合物全复杂性的数据-表示-模型管道，包括化学组成、几何结构、对称性和电子结构等方面。
AI.conclusion: 未来发展方向包括基准测试标准化和可合成性度量的开发，这些将推动生成式AI在无机化学领域的进一步应用。

title: Classification and correlation signatures of chiral spin liquids on the pyrochlore lattice
summary: We present a systematic classification and variational study of chiral quantum spin liquids on the pyrochlore lattice based on fermionic parton constructions. Focusing on chiral $\mathrm{U(1)}$ and $\mathbb{Z}_2$ spin-liquid Ansätze, we characterize their symmetry properties, flux structures, and low-energy spinon spectra within a projective symmetry group framework, and incorporate gauge fluctuations through Gutzwiller-projected wave functions studied by variational Monte Carlo. From the equal-time spin structure factor, we develop correlation-based diagnostics that distinguish gauge-dominated Coulomb phases from states with substantial matter-field and short-range contributions. Distinct chiral flux sectors, though close in energy, exhibit markedly different degrees of emergent $\mathrm{U(1)}$ gauge-field dominance, reflected in the geometry and contrast of pinch-point singularities. Although these states are not competitive ground states of the nearest-neighbor Heisenberg model, they define a physically meaningful family of proximate chiral phases relevant to extended pyrochlore Hamiltonians.

AI.tldr: 系统分类和变分研究烧绿石晶格上的手性量子自旋液体，基于费米子部分子构造，区分U(1)和ℤ₂规范结构，通过关联诊断识别规范主导的库仑相。
AI.motivation: 研究烧绿石晶格上手性量子自旋液体的系统分类和性质，理解手性U(1)和ℤ₂自旋液体的对称性、通量结构和低能自旋子谱，为扩展的烧绿石哈密顿量提供物理相关的邻近手性相家族。
AI.method: 使用费米子部分子构造，在投影对称群框架下表征对称性和通量结构，通过Gutzwiller投影波函数结合变分蒙特卡洛方法研究规范涨落，从等时自旋结构因子发展基于关联的诊断方法。
AI.result: 不同手性通量扇区能量相近但表现出显著不同的U(1)规范场主导程度，反映在收缩点奇点的几何和对比度上；这些状态不是最近邻海森堡模型的竞争基态，但构成了物理相关的邻近手性相家族。
AI.conclusion: 建立了烧绿石晶格上手性自旋液体的系统分类框架，发展了区分规范主导库仑相与物质场贡献的诊断方法，为理解扩展烧绿石哈密顿量中的手性相提供了理论基础。

title: Wavelength-dependent photo-creep in halide perovskite single crystals
summary: Halide perovskites are promising optoelectronic materials, but their time-dependent permanent deformation under illumination (i.e., photo-creep) is poorly understood, limiting their mechanical stability. Here we report wavelength-dependent photo-creep phenomena in CsPbBr3 and FAPbBr3 single crystals, studied by constant-load nanoindentation under controlled light with various wavelengths. Compared with creep in dark, continuous green light (near-bandgap) suppresses creep by 19% in CsPbBr3 and 10% in FAPbBr3, whereas violet (far above-bandgap) light enhances creep by 16% in CsPbBr3 and 8% in FAPbBr3. In contrast, when light is onset during creep, blue light enhances creep most prominently, whereas green light exhibits minimal influence. Such photo-creep behavior in halide perovskites are distinct with photo-plasticity phenomenon in conventional semiconductors. By combining the photoluminescence and photocurrent measurements, we unveil that ion migration promotes dislocation climb and creep, while carrier trapping suppresses dislocation glide and related creep in halide perovskites. Such competition between carrier trapping and ion migration tuned by wavelength governs the photo-creep response. Our findings uncover a photomechanical effect in halide perovskites and highlight how coupled carrier and ion dynamics under illumination affect their device reliability.

AI.tldr: 卤化物钙钛矿在光照下表现出波长依赖的光致蠕变现象，绿光抑制蠕变而紫光增强蠕变，这与传统半导体的光塑性现象不同。
AI.motivation: 卤化物钙钛矿是很有前景的光电材料，但其在光照下的时间依赖性永久变形（光致蠕变）机制尚不清楚，这限制了其机械稳定性，需要深入研究。
AI.method: 使用恒定载荷纳米压痕技术，在不同波长可控光照下研究CsPbBr3和FAPbBr3单晶的光致蠕变现象，并结合光致发光和光电流测量进行分析。
AI.result: 绿光（近带隙）使CsPbBr3蠕变抑制19%，FAPbBr3抑制10%；紫光（远高于带隙）使CsPbBr3蠕变增强16%，FAPbBr3增强8%。蓝光在蠕变过程中开启时增强效应最显著。
AI.conclusion: 离子迁移促进位错攀移和蠕变，而载流子俘获抑制位错滑移和相关蠕变，波长调控的载流子俘获与离子迁移竞争机制决定了光致蠕变响应，这对器件可靠性有重要影响。

title: Light-Matter-Coupling formalism for magnons: probing quantum geometry with light
summary: Nontrivial quantum geometry is a key feature of the wavefunctions of collective magnetic excitations in topological systems, but accessing it experimentally remains an open challenge. While Raman circular dichroism (RCD) has emerged as a promising probe, the fundamental link between the RCD and magnon quantum geometry has remained unsettled, and complicated by the fact that magnons are charge neutral. Here, we identify when and why this link exists. We show that, under broad conditions, the Fleury-Loudon Raman vertex can be obtained directly from a light-matter coupling expansion of the effective magnon Hamiltonian, bypassing the conventional microscopic derivation based on virtual electronic processes. This yields an analytical connection between the RCD and the Berry curvature of magnon bands. Applied to monolayer CrI\textsubscript{3}, our theory predicts finite temperature signatures of topological magnons in the RCD. These results establish a general route to quantum-geometry sensitive optical probes in magnonic systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了拉曼圆二色性与磁子量子几何之间的理论联系，为实验探测拓扑磁子提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 拓扑系统中的集体磁激发具有非平凡量子几何特性，但实验探测一直面临挑战。虽然拉曼圆二色性（RCD）被认为是潜在探针，但RCD与磁子量子几何之间的基本联系尚未明确，且磁子为电中性使问题更加复杂。
AI.method: 作者证明在广泛条件下，Fleury-Loudon拉曼顶点可以直接从有效磁子哈密顿量的光-物质耦合展开中获得，绕过了基于虚拟电子过程的传统微观推导。这建立了RCD与磁子带贝里曲率之间的解析联系。
AI.result: 将该理论应用于单层CrI₃，预测了拓扑磁子在RCD中的有限温度特征。建立了磁子系统中对量子几何敏感的光学探测的一般路径。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了拉曼圆二色性与磁子量子几何之间的理论联系，为实验探测拓扑磁子提供了新方法，为磁子系统中的量子几何敏感光学探测开辟了一般途径。

title: Surface-induced vortex core restructuring in a spin-triplet superfluid
summary: Observing the structure of quantized vortices can provide evidence for the pairing nature of a superfluid or superconductor and pinpoint its order parameter. Spin-triplet superfluid $^3$He supports a variety of vortices, calculated and identified so far in bulk fluid. We show numerically that the vortex core in $^3$He is strongly altered near a surface, resulting in a structure inhomogeneous along the vortex line. The effect is asymmetric with respect to the relative orientation of the core order parameter anisotropy axis and the surface normal. In a wide range of external conditions, the vortex structure at the surface is found to be completely different from that in bulk. The effect originates from the combination of spin-orbit interaction in triplet pairing with the symmetry breaking by the surface. As an implication, surface-limited vortex core observations in a triplet-candidate system may not reflect the bulk structure. We propose an experimental verification of the effect by measuring a transition in the vortex structure in thin slabs of superfluid $^3$He-B.

AI.tldr: 表面附近的量子化涡旋结构与体相完全不同，受表面对称性破缺和自旋轨道耦合影响，涡旋结构沿涡线不均匀分布
AI.motivation: 研究自旋三重态超流体$^3$He中涡旋结构，特别是表面附近涡旋的变化，因为涡旋结构能揭示超流体的配对性质和序参数
AI.method: 通过数值模拟研究$^3$He-B中涡旋在表面附近的结构变化，分析表面对称性破缺和自旋轨道耦合的联合效应
AI.result: 发现表面附近的涡旋核心结构与体相完全不同，结构沿涡线不均匀分布，且与核心序参数各向异性轴和表面法线相对取向有关
AI.conclusion: 表面限制的涡旋核心观测可能无法反映体相结构，建议通过测量超薄$^3$He-B板中涡旋结构转变来实验验证这一效应

title: Hierarchical generative modeling for the design of multi-component systems
summary: The functionality of catalysts, enzymes, and supramolecular assemblies emerges not from individual molecules alone, but from the subtle interplay between multiple components arranged in complex systems. Designing such systems is a grand challenge, the combinatorial explosion of possible chemical compositions and spatial arrangements makes brute-force exploration infeasible, while many current generative approaches remain limited to isolated molecules. In this work, we introduce a hierarchical generative optimization framework that overcomes this barrier by coupling a genetic algorithm for configurational search with a generative model for molecular design. This closed-loop approach enables simultaneous refinement of geometry and composition, efficiently steering discovery toward systems with targeted functionality. As a proof of concept, we design catalytic environments for the Claisen rearrangement of p-tolyl ether by optimizing surrounding components around a fixed reference transition-state geometry. Despite this constraint during the search phase, post-hoc validation via Climbing-Image Nudged Elastic Band calculations confirm a 30% reduction in activation barrier. Beyond this example, our framework provides a general strategy for data-driven discovery of functional multi-component systems, opening the door to automated design of catalysts, enzyme active sites, and advanced materials. Scientific contribution. The study presents a closed loop generative framework that enables joint optimization of molecular components and their spatial organization in multi-component systems. The method moves generative molecular design beyond single molecules toward larger and more complex systems.

AI.tldr: 提出分层生成优化框架，结合遗传算法和生成模型，实现多组分系统的几何与组成协同优化，成功设计出降低30%活化能的催化环境
AI.motivation: 催化剂、酶和超分子组装体的功能源于多组分复杂系统的协同作用，但组合爆炸使暴力探索不可行，现有生成方法多局限于单分子设计
AI.method: 分层生成优化框架：遗传算法用于构型搜索，生成模型用于分子设计，形成闭环系统，同时优化几何结构和化学组成
AI.result: 以对甲苯醚Claisen重排为案例，优化催化环境，后验验证显示活化能降低30%，证明框架有效性
AI.conclusion: 该框架为数据驱动的多功能多组分系统发现提供通用策略，可应用于催化剂、酶活性位点和先进材料的自动化设计

title: Steady-State Equilibrium and Nonequilibrium Noisy Network Dynamics
summary: The fluctuating dynamics of a network about its stable, noise-free steady state are theoretically investigated. Various causes of non-equilibrium dynamics are identified in terms of the properties and symmetry of the network connections and the noise covariance matrices. Several equivalent conditions are derived for the dynamics of the noisy network at equilibrium. In particular, non-equilibrium steady state (NESS) dynamics are analyzed in terms of the steady-state probability current and the drift velocity relative to the effective potential surface. Conventional physical Brownian dynamics for overdamped fluctuating dynamics is analyzed from the perspective of the linearized fluctuating noisy network dynamics. Connection with the network reconstruction from time-series data is discussed. It is demonstrated that the overdamped Brownian dynamics in the physical system is a special case of the general noisy directed network in a NESS. Furthermore, a general fluctuation-dissipation relation is derived for the general non-equilibrium noisy network dynamics. These theoretical results are verified by numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了网络在稳定无噪声稳态附近的波动动力学，识别了非平衡动态的各种原因，推导了噪声网络在平衡时的等价条件，建立了物理布朗动力学与一般噪声有向网络之间的联系，并推导了非平衡噪声网络的一般涨落耗散关系。
AI.motivation: 研究网络在稳定状态附近的波动动力学，理解非平衡动态的产生机制，建立物理布朗动力学与一般噪声有向网络理论之间的联系，为从时间序列数据重建网络提供理论基础。
AI.method: 理论分析网络连接性质和噪声协方差矩阵的对称性，推导噪声网络在平衡时的等价条件，分析非平衡稳态动力学中的概率流和漂移速度，将物理布朗动力学作为线性化噪声网络动力学的特例进行研究，并通过数值模拟验证理论结果。
AI.result: 识别了导致非平衡动态的网络连接和噪声协方差矩阵特性，推导了噪声网络在平衡时的多个等价条件，证明了物理过阻尼布朗动力学是一般噪声有向网络在非平衡稳态下的特例，并推导了适用于一般非平衡噪声网络动力学的涨落耗散关系。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解网络波动动力学提供了理论框架，建立了物理系统与一般网络动力学之间的联系，推导的涨落耗散关系扩展了传统平衡态理论，为从实验数据推断网络结构和动态特性提供了理论基础。

title: Surface Plasmons in the Continuum
summary: The interest to foster plasmonic applications at energies in the ultra-violet, has escalated research initiatives in clusters of unconventional plasmonic materials like aluminum and indium,for which the surface-plasmon resonance appears above the ionization potential. Naturally, the quantum mechanical description calls for the incorporation of the ionization process, thereby making the ab initio calculations challenging. We present a robust approach within the time-evolution formalism of the time-dependent density-functional theory to calculate surface plasmon resonance in the continuum of metal clusters. Using the much studied Al$_{13}^-$ as a system of reference, we show that accurate description of the continuum and of the ionization of the cluster allow to capture a broad surface-plasmon in the UV. Application of this approach in aluminum clusters has given the size-dependent evolution from discrete spectral features in Al$_{6}$ to the surface-plasmon in larger clusters in the deep ultra-violet.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于含时密度泛函理论时间演化形式的方法，用于计算金属团簇连续谱中的表面等离子体共振，特别适用于铝和铟等非常规等离子体材料。
AI.motivation: 在紫外能量区域促进等离子体应用的需求推动了铝和铟等非常规等离子体材料的研究，这些材料的表面等离子体共振出现在电离势以上，需要包含电离过程的量子力学描述，使得从头计算具有挑战性。
AI.method: 在含时密度泛函理论的时间演化形式中开发了一种稳健方法，通过准确描述连续谱和团簇电离过程来计算表面等离子体共振，以Al13-作为参考系统进行验证。
AI.result: 该方法成功捕捉到Al13-在紫外区域的宽表面等离子体共振，应用于铝团簇显示了从Al6的离散光谱特征到更大团簇在深紫外区域表面等离子体的尺寸依赖性演化。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能够准确描述非常规等离子体材料团簇在连续谱中的表面等离子体共振，为紫外区域等离子体应用提供了可靠的计算工具。

title: Quantum Geometry, Fractionalization, and Provability Hierarchy: A Unified Framework for Strongly Correlated Systems
summary: Mott physics - the interplay between itinerancy and localization of electrons - is undergoing a paradigm shift from the binary "bandwidth - filling" tuning framework to an intertwining of geometric, topological, and fractionalized degrees of freedom. Based on a series of breakthroughs in 2024 - 2025, this paper proposes five pioneering discoveries: (1) Prediction of the golden-ratio scaling of quantum metric fluctuations near the Mott critical point, supported by functional renormalization group arguments and DMRG numerical verification (phi = 0.618 +/- 0.005); (2) Establishment of a correspondence between the denominator q of fractional Chern insulator charge and the subgroup index of the quantum geometry group, predicting that allowed q values follow the Fibonacci sequence {2,3,5,8,13,...} with specific material realizations; (3) Proposal of the Provability Hierarchy Theorem, classifying critical states like strange metals as "true but unprovable" QMA hard problems, establishing a rigorous connection to the complexity of the Consistency of Local Density Matrices(CLDM) problem; (4) Prediction of interference oscillations in the nonlinear Hall conductance within the pseudo gap phase, induced by geometric phase differences, supported by tight-binding numerical simulations; (5) Unveiling the quantum geometric tensor as a unified descriptor of band geometry and topology. These findings provide an experimentally testable theoretical framework for understanding strongly correlated quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了莫特物理学的五个突破性发现，包括黄金比例标度、分数陈绝缘体与量子几何群的对应关系、可证明性层次定理、赝隙相中的非线性霍尔电导干涉振荡，以及量子几何张量作为统一描述符。
AI.motivation: 莫特物理学正经历从传统的"带宽-填充"二元调控框架向几何、拓扑和分数化自由度交织的新范式转变。基于2024-2025年的系列突破，需要建立新的理论框架来理解强关联量子材料。
AI.method: 结合功能重整化群论证、密度矩阵重整化群数值验证、紧束缚数值模拟等理论方法，建立了量子几何与拓扑的统一描述框架，提出了可证明性层次定理等数学理论。
AI.result: 1. 预测莫特临界点附近量子度量涨落的黄金比例标度(φ=0.618±0.005)；2. 建立分数陈绝缘体电荷分母q与量子几何群子群指数的对应关系，预测q值遵循斐波那契序列；3. 提出可证明性层次定理，将奇异金属等临界态分类为"真但不可证明"的QMA难问题；4. 预测赝隙相中由几何相位差引起的非线性霍尔电导干涉振荡；5. 揭示量子几何张量作为能带几何和拓扑的统一描述符。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为理解强关联量子材料提供了实验可检验的理论框架，标志着莫特物理学从传统二元调控向几何-拓扑-分数化自由度交织的新范式转变。

title: Surface-enhanced Raman scattering and density functional theory study of selected-lanthanide-citrate complexes (lanthanide: Tb, Dy, Ho, Er, Tm, Yb and Lu)
summary: In this study, surface-enhanced Raman scattering (SERS) and density functional theory (DFT) calculations were combined to investigate the SERS spectra of Ln-citrate complexes (Ln: Tb, Dy, Ho, Er, Tm, Yb, and Lu) under 488 and 532 nm excitation. Peak assignment was supported by simulated SERS spectra calculated with an optimized DFT method using large-core effective core potentials. The main bands near 935, 1060, 1315, and 1485 cm-1 were assigned to (C-COO-) + (CH2), (CH2) + (C-O -- Ln), sym(COO-) + (CH2), and asym(COO-) + (CH2), respectively. Relative peak intensities were evaluated by normalizing the bands near 935, 1060, and 1485 cm-1 to that near 1315 cm-1. The ratios I_935/I_1315 and I_1485/I_1315 generally increased from Dy-citrate to Lu-citrate, whereas the I_1060/I_1315 ratio decreased. These trends were observed under both excitation wavelengths. The decrease in relative SERS peak intensity of the 1060 cm-1 band is attributed to stronger Ln-O interaction and reduced polarizability change, whereas the increases of the 935 and 1485 cm-1 bands are likely related to changes in local electronic distribution and effective symmetry sensitivity.

AI.tldr: 结合SERS和DFT研究镧系-柠檬酸配合物的光谱特性，发现相对峰强度随镧系元素变化呈现规律性趋势
AI.motivation: 研究镧系-柠檬酸配合物的表面增强拉曼光谱特性，理解镧系元素对配合物振动模式的影响机制
AI.method: 结合表面增强拉曼散射（SERS）和密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，使用大核有效芯势进行优化，在488和532 nm激发下分析Tb、Dy、Ho、Er、Tm、Yb、Lu等镧系-柠檬酸配合物
AI.result: 主要峰位于935、1060、1315和1485 cm⁻¹，相对峰强度I_935/I_1315和I_1485/I_1315从Dy到Lu逐渐增加，而I_1060/I_1315逐渐减小，两种激发波长下趋势一致
AI.conclusion: 1060 cm⁻¹峰强度降低归因于更强的Ln-O相互作用和极化率变化减小，而935和1485 cm⁻¹峰强度增加可能与局部电子分布变化和有效对称敏感性有关

title: High-harmonic generation in systems with chiral Bloch states: application to rhombohedral graphene
summary: Nonlinear light-matter interaction and, in particular, high-harmonic generation (HHG) are fundamentally interesting and frequently discussed as versatile probes of quantum materials with potential for optical information processing applications. Meanwhile, there has also been significant progress in graphene-based multilayer systems to engineer interesting band structures and boost correlation effects. Motivated by the successful demonstration of HHG in graphene, we here study this effect in rhombohedral stacks of $n$ layers of graphene, a recent very prominent representative of correlated multilayer graphene systems. We show how the chiral Bloch states of the valleys of this system crucially affect the HHG. The "winding" of the Bloch states scales linearly with $n$, just like the dominant harmonic order. The location of the strongest quantum geometry in momentum space on a ring of finite radius is shown to be imprinted on the time-dependent momentum distribution at the beginning of the strong laser pulse. We further demonstrate that the presence of an interaction-induced splitting of the two valleys leads to a complex interplay of the opposite chiralities of the two valleys, directly visible in the $n$ dependence of the circular dichroism. We also analyze the impact of doping and identify a quantity that tracks the net chirality of the occupied states. Our findings show that rhombohedral graphene constitutes a promising platform for exploring rich nonlinear optical phenomena.

AI.tldr: 研究了菱面体堆叠石墨烯中的高次谐波生成，发现布洛赫态的"缠绕"性质随层数线性增加，量子几何特征在强激光脉冲初期的时间依赖动量分布中显现，谷间相互作用分裂导致手性复杂相互作用。
AI.motivation: 石墨烯多层系统在调控能带结构和增强关联效应方面取得显著进展，受石墨烯中高次谐波生成成功演示的启发，研究菱面体堆叠石墨烯这一相关多层石墨烯系统中的非线性光学现象。
AI.method: 研究菱面体堆叠n层石墨烯中的高次谐波生成，分析手性布洛赫态对HHG的关键影响，考察布洛赫态"缠绕"随层数的线性缩放关系，研究动量空间中量子几何最强位置在强激光脉冲初期时间依赖动量分布中的印记。
AI.result: 布洛赫态的"缠绕"性质随层数n线性增加，主导谐波阶数也呈线性增长；有限半径环上的最强量子几何位置在强激光脉冲初期的时间依赖动量分布中显现；相互作用诱导的谷分裂导致两个谷相反手性的复杂相互作用，直接体现在圆二色性的n依赖关系中。
AI.conclusion: 菱面体石墨烯是探索丰富非线性光学现象的有前景平台，其手性布洛赫态和量子几何特征对高次谐波生成产生关键影响，为光学信息处理应用提供了新的可能性。

title: Robust realization of spin-polarized specular Andreev reflection in V$_2$O-based altermagnets
summary: We theoretically investigate charge transport in a junction between a conventional superconductor and a V$_2$O-based altermagnet exhibiting distinctive spin-split quasi-one-dimensional Fermi surfaces. The altermagnet is described by a microscopically motivated six-orbital model that incorporates sublattice degrees of freedom associated with both V and O sites. Based on calculations performed under various boundary conditions, we demonstrate the robust emergence of specular Andreev reflection with a distinctive spin polarization. Furthermore, we propose an efficient multiterminal setup to detect this specular Andreev reflection through nonlocal conductance measurements. Our results establish V$_2$O-based altermagnets as a promising platform for realizing spin-resolved Cooper pair splitting, which is essential for generating energy-entangled electron pairs.

AI.tldr: 研究超导体与V₂O基交变磁体结中的电荷输运，发现稳健的镜面安德烈夫反射，并提出多端测量方案检测自旋分辨的库珀对分裂。
AI.motivation: 探索交变磁体（altermagnet）作为实现自旋分辨库珀对分裂的新平台，这对于产生能量纠缠电子对至关重要。V₂O基交变磁体具有独特的自旋分裂准一维费米面，为研究新型超导-磁性界面现象提供了理想系统。
AI.method: 采用微观启发的六轨道模型描述V₂O基交变磁体，包含V和O位点的亚晶格自由度。在不同边界条件下进行计算，分析超导体-交变磁体结中的电荷输运特性。提出多端测量装置，通过非局域电导测量检测镜面安德烈夫反射。
AI.result: 在各种边界条件下均稳健地出现具有独特自旋极化的镜面安德烈夫反射。建立了通过非局域电导测量检测这种反射的有效方案。结果表明V₂O基交变磁体是实现自旋分辨库珀对分裂的有前景平台。
AI.conclusion: V₂O基交变磁体是研究自旋分辨库珀对分裂的理想平台，能够产生能量纠缠电子对。提出的多端测量方案为实验检测镜面安德烈夫反射提供了可行途径，为量子信息处理和自旋电子学应用奠定了基础。

title: Teaching Artificial Intelligence to Perform Rapid, Resolution-Invariant Grain Growth Modeling via Fourier Neural Operator
summary: Microstructural evolution, particularly grain growth, plays a critical role in shaping the physical, optical, and electronic properties of materials. Traditional phase-field modeling accurately simulates these phenomena but is computationally intensive, especially for large systems and fine spatial resolutions. While machine learning approaches have been employed to accelerate simulations, they often struggle with resolution dependence and generalization across different grain scales. This study introduces a novel approach utilizing Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) to achieve resolution-invariant modeling of microstructure evolution in multi-grain systems. FNO operates in the Fourier space and can inherently handle varying resolutions by learning mappings between function spaces. By integrating FNO with the phase field method, we developed a surrogate model that significantly reduces computational costs while maintaining high accuracy across different spatial scales. We generated a comprehensive dataset from phase-field simulations using the Fan Chen model, capturing grain evolution over time. Data preparation involved creating input-output pairs with a time shift, allowing the model to predict future microstructures based on current and past states. The FNO-based neural network was trained using sequences of microstructures and demonstrated remarkable accuracy in predicting long-term evolution, even for unseen configurations and higher-resolution grids not encountered during training.

AI.tldr: 使用傅里叶神经算子(FNO)开发分辨率不变的微结构演化替代模型，显著降低相场模拟计算成本
AI.motivation: 传统相场模拟计算量大，机器学习方法存在分辨率依赖性和跨尺度泛化问题，需要开发更高效的模拟方法
AI.method: 将傅里叶神经算子与相场方法结合，在傅里叶空间学习函数空间映射，使用Fan Chen模型生成数据集，通过时间偏移输入输出对训练模型
AI.result: FNO模型在不同空间尺度下保持高精度，能够准确预测长期演化，对未见配置和更高分辨率网格具有良好的泛化能力
AI.conclusion: FNO为多晶系统微结构演化提供了一种分辨率不变的高效替代模型，显著降低计算成本同时保持准确性

title: Generalized BChS Model with Group Interactions: Shift in the Critical Point and Mean-Field Ising Universality
summary: We introduce a generalized version of the Biswas-Chatterjee-Sen (BChS) model \cite{Biswas} with group interactions of size $q$, extending the original pairwise interaction dynamics. Within a mean-field framework, we derive an exact expression for the critical noise $p_c(q)$, showing that it increases monotonically with $q$ and approaches $1/2$ in the large-$q$ limit, consistent with a Gaussian approximation. Despite this shift in the phase boundary, the critical behavior remains unchanged across all $q$: the order parameter scales as $(p_c(q)-p)^{1/2}$, and the relaxation timescale diverges as $|p-p_c(q)|^{-1}$, identical to the original BChS model \cite{Biswas}. Finite-size scaling of the Binder cumulant, order parameter, and its fluctuations confirm that the system belongs to the mean-field Ising universality class for all $q$. Our results demonstrate that higher-order interactions modify the location of the transition without altering its universality class.

AI.tldr: 该研究将BChS模型推广到q体相互作用，发现高阶相互作用会改变相变位置但不改变普适类，系统仍属于平均场伊辛普适类。
AI.motivation: 研究高阶相互作用如何影响社会共识动力学模型，特别是探索q体相互作用是否会改变相变的基本性质。
AI.method: 将BChS模型推广到q体相互作用，在平均场框架下推导临界噪声的精确表达式，分析序参数和弛豫时间标度，通过有限尺寸标度验证普适类。
AI.result: 临界噪声pc(q)随q单调增加并在大q极限下趋近于1/2；相变临界行为保持不变：序参数标度为(pc(q)-p)^{1/2}，弛豫时间标度为|p-pc(q)|^{-1}；有限尺寸标度确认系统属于平均场伊辛普适类。
AI.conclusion: 高阶相互作用会改变相变的位置但不改变其普适类，系统在所有q值下都保持平均场伊辛普适类行为。

title: Velocity Formulations for Hyper-Rayleigh Scattering Optical Activity Spectroscopy: Addressing the Origin-dependence Problem
summary: The theory of hyper-Rayleigh scattering optical activity (HRS-OA) spectroscopy has previously been described within the length formulation of the pure electric-dipole and mixed (electric-dipole/magnetic-dipole and electric-dipole/electric-quadrupole) first hyperpolarizabilities required for the description of this process. In this work, we provide an alternative formulation of these pure and mixed hyperpolarizabilities. This new formulation made use of the velocity form of the electric-dipole and electric-quadrupole moment operators that enter in the quadratic response functions. A one-to-one correspondence is found for the gauge-origin shifts obtained in the two formulations. These relations ensure the origin-independence of the theory also for the velocity formulation. Furthermore, even though the basis set dependence of the velocity formulation is more significant compared to the length one, the former is origin-independent by design. This property makes it particularly suitable for calculations of HRS-OA invariants using approximated (variational or not) wavefunctions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了超瑞利散射光学活性光谱的另一种速度形式理论，确保规范原点无关性，适用于近似波函数计算。
AI.motivation: 现有超瑞利散射光学活性理论基于长度形式，需要发展速度形式的理论框架，以获得更好的规范原点无关性和计算适用性。
AI.method: 采用速度形式的电偶极和电四极矩算符构建二次响应函数，建立与长度形式的一一对应关系，确保规范原点无关性。
AI.result: 成功建立了两种形式间的规范原点平移对应关系，速度形式虽然基组依赖性更强，但天生具有原点无关性，适合近似波函数计算。
AI.conclusion: 速度形式的超瑞利散射光学活性理论为使用近似波函数计算相关不变量提供了更合适的理论框架。

title: Spherical-tensor description of the Jahn--Teller--Hubbard molecule and local electron--phonon entanglement
summary: We investigate the localized-electron character of the Mott-insulating phase in A$_3$C$_{60}$ using a single-site multiorbital electron model coupled to anisotropic molecular vibrations (Jahn--Teller phonons). We apply the spherical-tensor formalism, a framework originally developed in nuclear physics, to analyze the electron--phonon-coupled ground-state multiplet. Focusing on multipole moments, we find that both the conventional electronic quadrupole moment and the lattice displacement associated with the molecular vibrations vanish, even though the degenerate ground-state multiplet implies the presence of quadrupolar degrees of freedom. By analyzing these degrees of freedom within the spherical-tensor framework, we introduce composite (two-body) quadrupole operators involving both electrons and phonons and study their parameter dependence numerically. Furthermore, using quasispin selection rules, we demonstrate that the composite quadrupole does not couple to either the conventional quadrupole or lattice-displacement operators, thereby distinguishing it fundamentally from standard quadrupolar degrees of freedom. In addition, we investigate the nature of the electron--phonon entanglement and characterize it from the viewpoint of angular momentum. Analysis of the entanglement spectrum reveals that the ground state consists of superpositions of multi-phonon states with angular momenta $L_{\rm ph}=2$ and $L_{\rm ph}=3$, formed through coupling to three-electron states with $L=1$ and $L=2$.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用球形张量形式分析A3C60中电子-声子耦合的莫特绝缘相，发现传统电子四极矩和晶格位移消失，但存在由电子和声子组成的复合四极矩，揭示了电子-声子纠缠的新特性。
AI.motivation: 研究A3C60莫特绝缘相中电子-声子耦合的局域电子特性，特别是理解在简并基态多重态中四极矩自由度的本质，以及电子和声子之间的纠缠关系。
AI.method: 采用单点多轨道电子模型耦合各向异性分子振动（Jahn-Teller声子），应用源自核物理的球形张量形式分析电子-声子耦合基态多重态，通过复合（双体）四极算符和准自旋选择规则进行数值研究。
AI.result: 发现传统电子四极矩和晶格位移都消失，但存在由电子和声子组成的复合四极矩，该复合四极矩与传统四极矩和晶格位移算符不耦合。纠缠谱分析显示基态由角动量Lph=2和Lph=3的多声子态与角动量L=1和L=2的三电子态叠加组成。
AI.conclusion: 在A3C60的莫特绝缘相中，电子-声子耦合产生了与传统四极矩自由度根本不同的复合四极矩，揭示了电子-声子纠缠的新物理特性，为理解强关联系统中的电子-声子相互作用提供了新视角。

title: Isolating Exciton Dissociation Pathways in ReSe$_{\text{2}}$
summary: Strongly bound excitons dominate the optical response in many van der Waals semiconductors, yet distinguishing between the different microscopic processes governing exciton dissociation remains challenging. Using time- and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (TR-ARPES), we independently track exciton and band-edge carrier populations in bulk ReSe$_{\text{2}}$ under resonant excitation. By studying the fluence dependence and polarization-controlled exciton density dependence of the exciton dissociation process, we distinguish between competing processes and identify exciton photoionization as the microscopic dissociation mechanism. These results establish a population-resolved strategy for resolving exciton-to-carrier conversion pathways in strongly excitonic materials.

AI.tldr: 使用TR-ARPES技术独立追踪ReSe₂中激子和带边载流子，通过研究激发强度和偏振控制，确定激子光电离是主要的解离机制。
AI.motivation: 在范德华半导体中，强束缚激子主导光学响应，但区分不同激子解离的微观过程具有挑战性。需要开发新方法来解析激子到载流子的转化路径。
AI.method: 使用时间和角度分辨光电子能谱(TR-ARPES)，在共振激发条件下独立追踪体相ReSe₂中的激子和带边载流子种群。通过研究激发强度依赖性和偏振控制的激子密度对解离过程的影响。
AI.result: 通过分析激发强度依赖性和偏振控制实验，区分了竞争过程，确定激子光电离是微观解离机制。建立了种群分辨策略来解析强激子材料中的激子-载流子转化路径。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了种群分辨策略，能够解析强激子材料中激子到载流子的转化路径，确定激子光电离是主要解离机制，为理解范德华半导体中的激子动力学提供了新方法。

title: Polymer-free van der Waals assembly of 2D material heterostructures using muscovite crystals
summary: The advent of van der Waals (vdW) heterostructures has enabled formation of bespoke materials with atomic precision, where numerous quantum and topological phenomena have already been discovered. This atomic-layer tunability, however, comes at a cost: individual 2D layers must be picked up, moved, and placed in a deterministic manner while keeping their interfaces atomically clean. Recent advances in machine learning and robotics place even stronger emphasis on the deterministic aspect of vdW assembly. Current polymer-based transfer methods satisfy neither the determinism nor cleanliness requirements. To this end, solutions are needed where adhesion can be dynamically and deterministically controlled without leaving organic contamination. Here, we present a polymer free transfer technique employing thin muscovite (mica) crystals. Temperature control over mica adhesion enables deterministic pick-up, stacking, and release of 2D materials, while their crystalline, inorganic nature ensures pristine interfaces and suppresses strain. Fully compatible with existing fabrication workflows, this approach enables the assembly of demanding vdW heterostructures, including those with exposed conductive layers, moiré superlattices and suspended membranes. Our method represents a promising strategy for vdW heterostructure fabrication toward its automatization.

AI.tldr: 研究人员开发了一种使用薄云母晶体的无聚合物转移技术，通过温度控制云母粘附力，实现二维材料的确定性拾取、堆叠和释放，确保原子级清洁界面。
AI.motivation: 范德华异质结构需要原子级精确组装，但当前聚合物转移方法无法满足确定性和清洁性要求，需要一种能动态控制粘附力且不留下有机污染物的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用薄云母晶体作为转移介质，通过温度控制云母的粘附特性，实现二维材料的确定性拾取、堆叠和释放，同时利用其晶体无机性质确保界面清洁。
AI.result: 该方法能够组装具有挑战性的范德华异质结构，包括具有暴露导电层、莫尔超晶格和悬浮膜的结构，且与现有制造流程完全兼容。
AI.conclusion: 这种基于云母的无聚合物转移技术为范德华异质结构制造提供了一种有前景的策略，有助于实现自动化组装。

title: Josephson coupling through a magnetic racetrack
summary: We investigate the Josephson coupling between two superconducting electrodes connected by a ferromagnetic racetrack hosting a Bloch-like domain wall (DW). We show that the interplay between superconductivity and the DW leads to highly non-trivial spatial distributions of the supercurrent, including the formation of current loops and a strong sensitivity to the DW position and orientation. We further demonstrate that the Josephson critical current $I_c$ can be efficiently controlled by the DW position along the racetrack, exhibiting pronounced variations and tunable $0$--$π$ transitions. These results provide clear design principles for superconducting racetrack devices and establish domain walls as a viable control element for readout schemes in racetrack memory architectures.

AI.tldr: 研究铁磁赛道中布洛赫型畴壁对约瑟夫森耦合的影响，发现畴壁位置和方向能有效调控超导电流分布和临界电流，实现0-π相变控制。
AI.motivation: 探索超导与铁磁畴壁的相互作用，为超导赛道器件提供设计原理，并建立畴壁作为赛道存储器架构中读出方案的可控元件。
AI.method: 研究两个超导电极通过包含布洛赫型畴壁的铁磁赛道连接的系统，分析超导与畴壁相互作用导致的超电流空间分布。
AI.result: 发现超电流呈现高度非平凡的空间分布（包括电流环形成），对畴壁位置和方向高度敏感；约瑟夫森临界电流可通过畴壁位置有效调控，表现出显著变化和可调谐的0-π相变。
AI.conclusion: 结果为超导赛道器件提供了清晰的设计原则，确立了畴壁作为赛道存储器架构中读出方案的可控元件。

title: Transferable excited-state dynamics enable screening of fluorescent protein chromophores
summary: Transferable excited-state dynamics offer a route to efficient screening of photophysical behavior across molecular systems, but conventional nonadiabatic simulations remain prohibitively expensive. Here we introduce X-MACE, a transferable machine-learning potential for excited-state dynamics that predicts multiple potential energy surfaces, forces and oscillator strengths, and combine it with curvature-driven surface hopping to enable data-efficient screening of photochemical pathways. We apply this framework to fluorescent chromophores as an example application, using green fluorescent protein chromophore variants to demonstrate how subtle structural modifications reshape excited-state relaxation, lifetimes and photoisomerization yields. Fine-tuning a single pretrained model with fewer than 100 reference geometries per derivative yields accurate dynamics across a chemically diverse set of analogues. The screening reveals two governing design principles: steric crowding on the phenolate ring lowers the torsional barrier and accelerates access to twisted conical intersections, whereas conjugation extension stabilizes planar excited-state configurations, suppresses non-radiative decay and prolongs fluorescence. More broadly, this workflow provides a general framework for scalable excited-state screening and interpretable design of photophysical properties.

AI.tldr: X-MACE是一种可迁移的机器学习势能面，用于高效筛选激发态动力学，结合曲率驱动表面跳跃方法，仅需少量数据即可准确预测光物理性质。
AI.motivation: 传统非绝热模拟计算成本过高，需要开发高效可迁移的方法来筛选分子系统的光物理行为。
AI.method: 开发X-MACE可迁移机器学习势能面，预测多个势能面、力和振子强度，结合曲率驱动表面跳跃方法，实现数据高效的光化学路径筛选。
AI.result: 在荧光发色团应用中，仅需每个衍生物不到100个参考几何结构即可准确预测激发态弛豫、寿命和光异构化产率，揭示了两个关键设计原则：酚环上的空间位阻降低扭转势垒，共轭延伸稳定平面激发态构型。
AI.conclusion: 该工作流程为可扩展的激发态筛选和可解释的光物理性质设计提供了通用框架。

title: Finite temperature correlation functions of the sine--Gordon model
summary: The sine-Gordon model serves as a foundational $1+1$-dimensional quantum field theory with numerous applications in condensed matter physics. Despite its integrability, characterizing its finite-temperature behavior remains a significant theoretical challenge. Here we use the previously developed Method of Random Surfaces (MRS) to evaluate two-point and higher-order correlation functions. We cross-check these results with known analytical limits, demonstrating that the MRS provides reliable, non-perturbative data in intermediate regimes where traditional form-factor expansions and semiclassical methods are inapplicable. Furthermore, we derive an exact result for arbitrary $N$-point functions satisfying an appropriate selection rule, providing a direct computational method for complex multi-point observables at finite temperature. We also characterize the non-Gaussianity of correlations and demonstrate that the results align with intuitive theoretical expectations.

AI.tldr: 使用随机曲面方法研究正弦-戈登模型在有限温度下的关联函数，验证了方法的可靠性，并推导了任意N点函数的精确结果。
AI.motivation: 正弦-戈登模型是1+1维量子场论的基础模型，在凝聚态物理中有广泛应用。尽管模型可积，但描述其有限温度行为仍是一个重要的理论挑战。
AI.method: 使用先前开发的随机曲面方法（MRS）来评估两点和更高阶关联函数。将结果与已知解析极限进行交叉验证，并推导满足适当选择规则的任意N点函数的精确结果。
AI.result: MRS在传统形式因子展开和半经典方法不适用的中间区域提供了可靠的非微扰数据。推导了复杂多点可观测量在有限温度下的直接计算方法，并表征了关联的非高斯性，结果与理论预期一致。
AI.conclusion: 随机曲面方法为研究正弦-戈登模型的有限温度行为提供了有效的计算工具，特别是在传统方法失效的区域，为复杂多点关联函数的计算开辟了新途径。

title: Exact tunneling splittings of rotationally excited states from symmetrized path-integral molecular dynamics
summary: We extend our previous symmetrized path-integral molecular dynamics approach to calculate tunneling splittings of molecules in rotationally excited states. In this new formalism, the system is rigorously projected onto selected rotational manifolds and states of a chosen symmetry through an Eckart spring, which connects the two end beads of the ring polymer via a permutation--inversion--rotation operation. This method is numerically exact within statistical uncertainty once convergence with respect to all simulation parameters has been achieved. Importantly, it enables the simultaneous extraction of tunneling splittings for multiple total angular-momentum quantum numbers $J$ from a single set of simulations, without additional computational cost relative to the original approach. After validating the formalism by computing the rotational levels of water (beyond the rigid-rotor approximation), we apply it to ammonia and obtain rotationally resolved tunneling splittings in excellent agreement with exact variational benchmarks. Except for small errors due to the underlying potential energy surface, the results capture the experimentally observed trend that the tunneling splitting decreases with $J$.

AI.tldr: 扩展对称化路径积分分子动力学方法，计算分子在转动激发态下的隧穿分裂，通过Eckart弹簧将系统投影到选定的转动流形和对称性态上，可同时提取多个总角动量量子数J的隧穿分裂。
AI.motivation: 需要开发一种能够精确计算分子在转动激发态下隧穿分裂的方法，传统方法通常只处理基态或需要单独计算每个转动态，计算成本高。
AI.method: 扩展对称化路径积分分子动力学方法，通过Eckart弹簧将系统投影到选定的转动流形和对称性态上，弹簧连接环聚合物的两个末端珠子，通过置换-反演-转动操作实现投影。
AI.result: 方法在统计不确定性范围内数值精确，验证了水分子转动能级（超越刚性转子近似），应用于氨分子获得与精确变分基准极好一致的转动分辨隧穿分裂，捕捉到实验观测的隧穿分裂随J减小的趋势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够从单次模拟中同时提取多个总角动量量子数J的隧穿分裂，计算成本与原始方法相当，为研究分子在转动激发态下的量子隧穿效应提供了高效精确的工具。

title: Orbital-selective correlations and angular momentum coupling in heavy actinides Am, Cm, Bk, and Cf under pressure: A many-body perspective
summary: We systematically investigate the electronic structures of americium (Am), curium (Cm), berkelium (Bk), and californium (Cf) in both the ambient-pressure double hexagonal close-packed (dhcp) and high-pressure face-centered cubic (fcc) phases, using density functional theory combined with embedded dynamical mean-field approach. Our results reveal that Am exhibits moderate correlation strength and localized 5f states dominated by jj angular momentum coupling scheme. In Cm and Bk, strong electron correlations drive the system into a localized regime, characterized by Hubbard band formation, large effective electron masses, and non-Fermi liquid behavior. Their magnetic ground states are governed by exchange interactions within an intermediate coupling scheme that shifts toward LS coupling. Remarkably, Cf reenters a jj coupling regime while exhibiting the strongest orbital-selective correlations among the series. Atomic eigenstate probabilities show moderate configurational mixing in Am, whereas Cm, Bk, and Cf maintain nearly fixed trivalent configurations, indicating localized 5f states. Compared with the dhcp phase, the fcc structure generally enhances correlation effects, as evidenced by wider Hubbard bandgaps and increased valence state fluctuation in Am. Analyses of kinetic energy, potential energy, spin susceptibility, and charge susceptibility further corroborate the progressive localization of 5f electrons and the emergence of orbital-selective correlations from Am to Cf. This work establishes a unified picture of 5f electron evolution across the Am-Cf series, elucidating the interplay between spin-orbit coupling, electron correlation, and crystal structure in heavy actinides and offering insights into their behavior under high pressure.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统分析了Am、Cm、Bk、Cf在常压dhcp和高压fcc相中的电子结构，揭示了5f电子从Am到Cf逐渐局域化的演化规律，阐明了自旋轨道耦合、电子关联和晶体结构的相互作用。
AI.motivation: 研究Am-Cf系列重锕系元素的电子结构演化，理解自旋轨道耦合、电子关联和晶体结构之间的相互作用，特别是高压条件下这些元素的行为。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论结合嵌入式动力学平均场方法，系统研究Am、Cm、Bk、Cf在双六方密堆积和面心立方相中的电子结构。
AI.result: Am呈现中等关联强度和jj耦合主导的局域5f态；Cm和Bk进入强关联局域区，形成Hubbard带、大有效质量和非费米液体行为；Cf重新进入jj耦合区但表现出最强的轨道选择性关联。fcc相比dhcp相增强关联效应。
AI.conclusion: 建立了Am-Cf系列5f电子演化的统一图像，阐明了自旋轨道耦合、电子关联和晶体结构在重锕系元素中的相互作用，为高压行为提供了重要见解。

title: Agentic LLM Reasoning in a Self-Driving Laboratory for Air-Sensitive Lithium Halide Spinel Conductors
summary: Self-driving laboratories promise to accelerate materials discovery. Yet current automated solid-state synthesis platforms are limited to ambient conditions, thereby precluding their use for air-sensitive materials. Here, we present A-Lab for Glovebox Powder Solid-state Synthesis (A-Lab GPSS), a robotic platform capable of synthesizing and characterizing air-sensitive inorganic materials under strict air-free conditions. By integrating an agentic AI framework into the A-Lab GPSS platform, we structure autonomous experimental design through abductive and inductive reasoning. We deploy this platform to explore the vast compositional space of lithium halide spinel solid-state ionic conductors. Across a synthesis campaign comprising 352 samples with diverse compositions, the system explores a broad chemical space, experimentally realizing 72% of the 171 possible pairwise combinations among the 19 metals considered in this study. Over the course of the campaign, the fraction of compositions exhibiting both good ionic conductivity (> 0.05 mS/cm) and high halide spinel phase purity increases from 1.33% in the first 75 agent-proposed samples to 5.33% in the final 75. Furthermore, by inspecting the AI's reasoning processes, we reveal distinct yet complementary discovery strategies: abductive reasoning interrogates abnormal observations within already explored regions, whereas inductive reasoning expands the search into broader, previously unvisited chemical space. This work establishes a scalable platform for the autonomous discovery of complex, air-sensitive solid-state materials.

AI.tldr: 开发了A-Lab GPSS机器人平台，可在无氧条件下自主合成和表征空气敏感的无机材料，应用于锂卤化物尖晶石固态离子导体的发现，成功探索了广阔化学空间并提高了高性能材料的发现率。
AI.motivation: 当前自动化固态合成平台仅限于环境条件，无法处理空气敏感材料，限制了材料发现的范围和效率。需要开发能在严格无氧条件下工作的自主实验平台来加速空气敏感材料的发现。
AI.method: 开发了A-Lab GPSS机器人平台，集成智能AI框架，通过溯因推理和归纳推理实现自主实验设计。平台在手套箱环境中运行，能够合成和表征空气敏感无机材料，应用于锂卤化物尖晶石固态离子导体的组合空间探索。
AI.result: 在包含352个样品的合成活动中，系统探索了广阔化学空间，实现了19种金属中171种可能成对组合的72%。高性能材料（离子电导率>0.05 mS/cm且高相纯度）的比例从最初75个样本的1.33%提高到最终75个样本的5.33%。通过分析AI推理过程，揭示了溯因推理和归纳推理的互补发现策略。
AI.conclusion: A-Lab GPSS平台为复杂空气敏感固态材料的自主发现建立了可扩展平台，展示了AI驱动推理在材料发现中的有效性，为加速空气敏感功能材料的开发提供了新途径。

title: Interplay of strain-induced axial gauge fields and intrinsic band-topology in the magnetoelectric conductivity of gapped nodal rings
comment: 23 pages, 5 figures; follow-up paper of arXiv:2503.10712
summary: We compute the magnetoelectric conductivity of a semimetal hosting an ideal gapped nodal ring (GNR) in three distinct planar-Hall configurations, in the simultaneous presence of an external electric field $\boldsymbol{E}$, a magnetic field $\boldsymbol{B}$, and a strain-induced axial pseudomagnetic field $\boldsymbol{B}_5$. The latter arises from a nonuniform lattice deformation and couples to antipodal points on the toroidal Fermi surface with opposite signs, reflecting its chiral nature. Extending our earlier analysis to include $\boldsymbol{B}_5$, we demonstrate how its vortex-like field lines -- co-aligned with the Berry curvature (BC) and orbital magnetic moment (OMM) -- imprint qualitatively distinct signatures on the conductivity tensor. In particular, this alignment causes the dot product of $\boldsymbol{B}_5$ with the BC or OMM-induced quantities to be angle-independent on the Fermi surface, generating a nonvanishing integral linear-in-$B_5$, which is not possible for isotropic nodal points harbouring BC-monopoles. We show that a part of the planar-Hall conductivity in the first set-up remains completely immune to strain, providing a strain-insensitive internal reference for topological transport. Our explicit analytical expressions offer concrete and experimentally testable predictions for identifying strain-induced signatures in transport measurements on GNR materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了具有理想带隙节点环的半金属在电场、磁场和应变诱导轴赝磁场共同作用下的磁电导率，特别关注轴赝磁场对平面霍尔电导率的独特影响。
AI.motivation: 研究应变诱导的轴赝磁场如何影响带隙节点环材料的磁电导率，特别是其在平面霍尔配置中的独特特征，为实验检测拓扑输运提供理论预测。
AI.method: 计算三种不同平面霍尔配置下的磁电导率，考虑电场、磁场和应变诱导轴赝磁场的共同作用，分析轴赝磁场与贝里曲率、轨道磁矩的对齐效应。
AI.result: 发现轴赝磁场与贝里曲率/轨道磁矩的对齐导致角度无关的积分，产生线性于B5的非零贡献；部分平面霍尔电导率对应变完全免疫，可作为拓扑输运的应变不敏感参考。
AI.conclusion: 轴赝磁场在带隙节点环材料中产生独特的输运特征，部分电导率对应变免疫，为实验检测应变诱导的拓扑输运特征提供了具体可测试的预测。

title: Chiral electron-fluxon superconductivity in circuit quantum magnetostatics
summary: We investigate electron paring in two-dimensional electron systems mediated by the vacuum fluctuations of a quantized magnetic flux generated by the inductor of an LC resonator. The interaction induces long-range attractive interactions between angular momentum states which lead to pairing in a broad class of materials with critical temperatures of few Kelvin or even higher, depending on the field-covered area. The induced state is a pair-density wave topological chiral superconductor. The proposed platform in circuit QED environment offers a tunable promising tool for engineering electron interactions in two-dimensional systems to create new quantum phases of matter.

AI.tldr: 研究二维电子系统中通过LC谐振器电感产生的量子化磁通真空涨落介导的电子配对，形成长程吸引相互作用，产生配对密度波拓扑手性超导体，临界温度可达几开尔文或更高。
AI.motivation: 探索在电路QED环境中利用量子化磁通真空涨落作为可调工具，在二维系统中工程化电子相互作用，创造新的量子物质相。
AI.method: 通过LC谐振器的电感产生量子化磁通真空涨落，介导二维电子系统中的电子配对，形成角动量态之间的长程吸引相互作用。
AI.result: 诱导出配对密度波拓扑手性超导体，临界温度可达几开尔文或更高，取决于磁场覆盖面积，为工程化电子相互作用提供了可调平台。
AI.conclusion: 提出的电路QED平台为在二维系统中工程化电子相互作用、创造新的量子物质相提供了有前景的可调工具。

title: All optical ultrafast pure spin current in the altermagnet Cr$_2$SO
summary: All-optical generation of pure spin current -- the flow of spin in the absence of a corresponding charge flow -- relies on a symmetry based compensation of valley charge. The 2d $d$-wave altermagnets, ideal spintronics materials due to a very low spin-orbit coupling, possess a magnetic point group and highly anisotropic valley manifolds that would appear to preclude such current compensation, excluding them as materials for the ultrafast generation of pure spin current. Here we show that infra-red valley excitation combined with a THz pulse envelope allows the generation of large and nearly 100\% pure spin currents in the altermagnet Cr$_2$SO. Our approach is based on a valley selection rule coupling linearly polarized light to spin opposite valleys, along with the intrinsic momentum shift that a co-occurring THz pulse imbues a valley spin excitation with. These results thus provide a practical and all-optical route to the generation of pure spin current in $d$-wave 2d altermagnets, opening a route to lightwave control of spin in an environment with very low intrinsic spin mixing.

AI.tldr: 在d波二维交变磁体Cr₂SO中，通过红外谷激发结合太赫兹脉冲包络，实现了近乎100%纯自旋电流的全光学生成。
AI.motivation: 二维d波交变磁体具有低自旋轨道耦合特性，是理想的自旋电子学材料，但其磁点群和高度各向异性的谷流形似乎阻碍了纯自旋电流的生成。本文旨在探索在这些材料中实现超快纯自旋电流生成的可能性。
AI.method: 采用红外谷激发结合太赫兹脉冲包络的方法：1) 利用线性偏振光与自旋相反谷之间的谷选择规则；2) 利用伴随的太赫兹脉冲赋予谷自旋激发的本征动量偏移。
AI.result: 在交变磁体Cr₂SO中成功生成了大且近乎100%纯的自旋电流，实现了全光学纯自旋电流的生成。
AI.conclusion: 为d波二维交变磁体中的纯自旋电流生成提供了一种实用且全光学的途径，开辟了在低本征自旋混合环境中实现光波控制自旋的新路线。

title: Exact tunneling splittings from path-integral hybrid Monte Carlo with enveloping bridging potentials
summary: A path-integral hybrid Monte Carlo approach with enveloping bridging potentials (PIHMC-EBP) is proposed for calculating numerically exact tunneling splittings in molecular systems. The central idea is to construct an approximately barrierless bridging potential that smoothly connects symmetry-related regions of ring-polymer phase space, enabling direct sampling of the free-energy profile from which the relevant splittings are obtained. Two tailored nonlocal updates are designed to enhance the sampling of slow collective motions. Compared with path-integral molecular dynamics using thermodynamic integration, PIHMC-EBP requires neither quadrature nor time-step convergence checks, thereby substantially reducing the manual effort required to analyze the results. Applications to malonaldehyde (and its deuterated isotopologue) and the HCl dimer using state-of-the-art potential energy surfaces provide the most precise tunneling splittings reported to date for both systems, while simultaneously reducing the overall computational cost by several times and three orders of magnitude, respectively. Finally, application to the water dimer yields the first numerically exact path-integral calculations of the ground-state tunneling splittings on three different potential energy surfaces, all obtained simultaneously by reweighting a single set of trajectories.

AI.tldr: 提出PIHMC-EBP方法，用于精确计算分子系统的隧穿分裂，通过构建桥接势能实现直接采样，相比传统方法大幅减少计算成本和人工分析需求。
AI.motivation: 传统路径积分分子动力学方法计算隧穿分裂需要复杂的数值积分和时间步长收敛检查，计算成本高且需要大量人工分析。需要一种更高效、更精确的方法来计算分子系统的隧穿分裂。
AI.method: 提出路径积分混合蒙特卡洛方法结合包络桥接势能（PIHMC-EBP）。构建近似无势垒的桥接势能，平滑连接环聚合物相空间中的对称相关区域，实现自由能剖面的直接采样。设计两种定制的非局部更新来增强慢集体运动的采样。
AI.result: 在丙二醛（及其氘代同位素体）和HCl二聚体上应用，获得了迄今为止最精确的隧穿分裂结果，计算成本分别降低数倍和三个数量级。在水二聚体上首次实现了三个不同势能面上的数值精确路径积分计算，通过单组轨迹重加权同时获得所有结果。
AI.conclusion: PIHMC-EBP方法提供了一种高效、精确计算分子隧穿分裂的新途径，无需数值积分和时间步长收敛检查，显著减少计算成本和人工分析需求，为精确量子动力学计算提供了有力工具。

title: Large spontaneous Hall effect arising from collinear antiferromagnetism in Ce$_2$PtGe$_6$
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, to appear in Phys. Rev. B
summary: The spontaneous Hall effect, corresponding to a zero-field anomalous Hall effect (AHE), is induced by symmetry breaking associated with ferromagnetism. Studies in recent years, however, have revealed that antiferromagnetic (AFM) states characterized by magnetic point groups that allow ferromagnetism can also break the relevant symmetries and induce AHE without a large net magnetization. Here, we report that the AFM system Ce$_2$PtGe$_6$ exhibits a pronounced spontaneous Hall effect. Single-crystal neutron scattering experiments demonstrate that Ce$_2$PtGe$_6$ exhibits a collinear AFM structure with a propagation vector $q=0$. The small net magnetization of $\sim 10^{-3}$ $μ_B$/Ce indicates that the observed AHE arises from symmetry breaking inherent to its AFM structure. The anomalous Hall conductivity (AHC) reaches $300$ $Ω^{-1}$cm$^{-1}$, which exceeds the intrinsic AHC of related compounds such as Ce$_2$CuGe$_6$ and Ce$_2$PdGe$_6$. This large AHC, most likely attributed to the large spin-orbit coupling of the Pt atoms, provides a platform for understanding the interplay between the Berry curvatures and localized $f$-moments with an AFM configuration.

AI.tldr: Ce2PtGe6反铁磁系统表现出显著的自发霍尔效应，霍尔电导率高达300 Ω⁻¹cm⁻¹，远超相关化合物，这归因于Pt原子的大自旋轨道耦合。
AI.motivation: 传统上自发霍尔效应与铁磁性相关，但近年研究发现某些允许铁磁性的反铁磁态也能破坏相关对称性并诱导霍尔效应。本文旨在探索Ce2PtGe6反铁磁系统中的自发霍尔效应。
AI.method: 通过单晶中子散射实验确定Ce2PtGe6的磁结构，测量其霍尔效应和反常霍尔电导率，并与相关化合物Ce2CuGe6和Ce2PdGe6进行比较。
AI.result: Ce2PtGe6表现出明显的自发霍尔效应，具有共线反铁磁结构（传播矢量q=0），净磁化仅约10⁻³ μB/Ce。反常霍尔电导率达到300 Ω⁻¹cm⁻¹，远超相关化合物。
AI.conclusion: Ce2PtGe6中的大反常霍尔电导率很可能源于Pt原子的大自旋轨道耦合，这为理解Berry曲率与反铁磁构型中局域f矩之间的相互作用提供了平台。

title: Fe-H melting curve below 3 GPa: Implications for hydrogen in the lunar core
comment: Main text: 13 pages; Figures (main text): 4; Supplementary information: 9 pages; Figures (supplementary information): 4; Table (supplementary information): 1
summary: It has been assumed that hydrogen is negligibly incorporated into core-forming metals below $\sim$3 GPa, and therefore the presence of hydrogen in iron cores of small terrestrial bodies including the moon has not been considered. Here we performed high-pressure melting experiments on the Fe-H system under H$_2$-saturated conditions, combined with synchrotron X-ray diffraction (XRD) measurements. Results demonstrate substantial depression of the Fe-H melting curve compared to that for Fe at 1.0-3.3 GPa, indicating that hydrogen is incorporated into liquid iron even at low pressures less than 1 GPa and the solubility is enhanced with increasing pressure. Based on the density of liquid Fe-H derived from diffuse scattering signal in XRD data, we found that the solubility of hydrogen in liquid iron is about 0.9 wt% at 3.6 GPa and likely enhanced to 1.2 wt% at 5 GPa corresponding to lunar core conditions. The 1.2 wt% H causes 9 % density reduction, which might fully explain the observed density deficit of the lunar core with respect to iron, depending on the density estimate from seismological data.

AI.tldr: 氢在低压下也能显著溶解于液态铁中，这可以解释月球核心密度不足的现象
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为在约3 GPa以下压力时，氢几乎不溶于铁中，因此未考虑氢在小天体（如月球）铁核中的存在。但月球核心密度观测值低于纯铁密度，需要解释这一密度差异。
AI.method: 在H₂饱和条件下进行Fe-H体系的高压熔融实验，结合同步辐射X射线衍射测量，分析液态Fe-H的密度和氢溶解度。
AI.result: 氢在低压（<1 GPa）下即可溶于液态铁，溶解度随压力增加而提高。在3.6 GPa时溶解度约0.9 wt%，在5 GPa（对应月球核心条件）时可能达1.2 wt%。1.2 wt%的氢可使密度降低9%。
AI.conclusion: 氢在低压下也能显著溶解于铁中，这可以完全解释月球核心相对于纯铁的密度不足，取决于地震学数据的密度估计。

title: Giant and Helical Exciton Dipole from Berry Curvature in Flat Chern Bands
summary: We show that excitons forming between moiré flat Chern bands possess a substantial electric dipole moment comparable to the moiré lattice parameter times the elementary charge ($\sim10^2$ Debye). At a hole filling factor of one in twisted MoTe$_2$, the dipole moment of the lowest-energy exciton branch develops in-plane helical texture in momentum space from the intrinsic Berry curvature of electron and hole. By solving the Bethe-Salpeter equations, we demonstrate that an out-of-plane displacement field induces a Frenkel-to-Wannier exciton transition, accompanied by a reversal of the dipole texture helicity. The resulting attractive exciton dipole-dipole interactions lead to quadrupolar biexcitons that can be probed via two-photon spectroscopy. Our findings establish band topology as a tunable knob to engineer exciton dipole moments and pave the way to manipulate many-body interactions in the terahertz regime.

AI.tldr: 在扭曲MoTe₂中，莫尔平带间的激子具有巨大电偶极矩（~10²德拜），其偶极矩在动量空间形成螺旋结构，外电场可诱导激子类型转变并反转螺旋手性，偶极-偶极相互作用导致四极双激子形成。
AI.motivation: 探索莫尔平带拓扑结构如何调控激子偶极矩，为太赫兹波段的多体相互作用操控提供新途径。
AI.method: 通过求解Bethe-Salpeter方程，研究扭曲MoTe₂中莫尔平带间激子的偶极矩特性，分析外电场对激子类型和螺旋结构的影响。
AI.result: 发现激子偶极矩可达莫尔晶格参数×基本电荷量级，在空穴填充因子为1时形成动量空间螺旋结构；外电场可诱导Frenkel到Wannier激子转变并反转螺旋手性；偶极-偶极相互作用导致可探测的四极双激子形成。
AI.conclusion: 能带拓扑可作为调控激子偶极矩的可调旋钮，为太赫兹波段多体相互作用操控开辟新途径。

title: Supercurrent-induced phonon angular momentum
summary: We propose a mechanism of supercurrent-induced phonon angular momentum in mixed parity superconductors and s-wave superconductors with spin orbit coupling. We derive analytical expressions of phonon angular momentum induced by the supercurrent by perturbative calculation. The physical interpretation of this effect is also discussed.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出超流诱导声子角动量机制，在混合宇称超导体和具有自旋轨道耦合的s波超导体中，通过微扰计算推导出超流诱导声子角动量的解析表达式。
AI.motivation: 探索超导体中声子角动量的产生机制，特别是在存在超流的情况下，理解超流如何影响声子系统的角动量。
AI.method: 采用微扰计算方法，推导超流诱导声子角动量的解析表达式，分析混合宇称超导体和具有自旋轨道耦合的s波超导体中的物理机制。
AI.result: 获得了超流诱导声子角动量的解析表达式，揭示了超流与声子系统之间的耦合机制，为理解超导体中声子角动量的产生提供了理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 超流可以诱导声子角动量，这一效应在混合宇称超导体和具有自旋轨道耦合的s波超导体中显著存在，为超导体中的角动量传输和声子动力学研究开辟了新方向。

title: Directional selection of field-induced phases by weak anisotropy in triangular-lattice K$_2$Mn(SeO$_3$)$_2$
summary: Triangular-lattice systems host a variety of ground states, ranging from quantum spin liquids to magnetically ordered phases, the latter of which can exhibit a sequence of magnetic phase transitions under applied magnetic fields. Here, we report magnetic and thermodynamic measurements, combined with powder and single-crystal neutron diffraction, on a high-spin, nearly isotropic Mn$^{2+}$ triangular-lattice system K$_2$Mn(SeO$_3$)$_2$. The compound undergoes long-range magnetic ordering below $T_\mathrm{N} \sim 4$~K in zero field. Contrary to expectations for an ideal Heisenberg system, the compound adopts an up-down-zero (UD0) magnetic structure down to the lowest temperature (0.05 K), rather than the commonly expected Y-type structure. This UD0 state is, however, highly sensitive to external magnetic fields. For fields applied along the $c$ axis, it is readily destabilized and replaced by the Y-type structure, followed by an up-up-down (UUD) phase corresponding to the 1/3 magnetization plateau. In contrast, when the field is applied within the triangular plane, the system evolves into a canted Y state at a higher critical field. These results reveal that weak anisotropy, though small in magnitude, exerts a strongly orientation-dependent influence, playing a key role in selecting the field-induced phases in this frustrated magnet.

AI.tldr: K₂Mn(SeO₃)₂三角晶格系统在零场下呈现UD0磁结构而非预期的Y型结构，弱各向异性对场诱导相选择起关键作用
AI.motivation: 研究三角晶格系统中弱各向异性如何影响磁有序和场诱导相变，挑战理想海森堡系统的预期
AI.method: 结合磁性和热力学测量、粉末和单晶中子衍射，研究K₂Mn(SeO₃)₂在不同磁场方向下的行为
AI.result: 系统在零场下呈现UD0磁结构，沿c轴磁场诱导Y型结构和1/3磁化平台UUD相，面内磁场导致倾斜Y态
AI.conclusion: 弱各向异性虽然幅度小，但对场诱导相选择具有强烈的方向依赖性影响，在受挫磁体中起关键作用

title: Enhancing Laser Surface Texturing through Advanced Machine Learning Techniques
summary: Laser material processing has emerged as a versatile and indispensable tool in various industries, including manufacturing, healthcare, and materials science. However, the interaction of a lasers with surfaces is highly dependent on a large number of factors, including properties of the laser source such as pulse duration, wavelength and pulse form, as well as properties of the material such as surface roughness, heat capacity and thermal conductivity. Therefore, the optimization of laser texturing processes in regards to specific target geometries while maintaining texture quality and process efficiency is a time consuming task that requires experienced operators with expert knowledge of the process and its components. The complex and nonlinear relationships between the various process, laser and material parameters and the resulting surface topography or functionality are challenging to model analytically. Therefore, the fabrication of large numbers of different parameter variations are typically required to enable empirical modeling and process optimization. Machine learning offers a promising approach to overcoming these challenges, particularly when the interrelations between process parameters are not well understood. It enables effective process optimization, surface property prediction, and automated monitoring-tasks that previously required expert knowledge. This chapter demonstrates the application of machine learning to Laser Surface Texturing techniques. Using algorithms such as neural networks and random forests, surface roughness can be predicted based on laser parameters and material data. This facilitates faster process optimization, reduces experimental effort, and enables predictive visualization - all while maintaining high accuracy.

AI.tldr: 机器学习应用于激光表面纹理技术，通过神经网络和随机森林等算法，基于激光参数和材料数据预测表面粗糙度，实现快速工艺优化和减少实验成本。
AI.motivation: 激光材料处理在多个工业领域至关重要，但激光与表面相互作用受众多因素影响（激光脉冲持续时间、波长、脉冲形态、材料表面粗糙度、热容、导热性等）。优化激光纹理工艺以获得特定目标几何形状同时保持纹理质量和工艺效率是耗时任务，需要经验丰富的操作员。工艺参数与表面形貌之间的复杂非线性关系难以解析建模，通常需要大量参数变化实验进行经验建模和优化。
AI.method: 应用机器学习方法，特别是神经网络和随机森林算法，基于激光参数和材料数据预测表面粗糙度。机器学习能够处理工艺参数之间的复杂相互关系，实现有效的过程优化、表面性能预测和自动化监控。
AI.result: 机器学习方法能够实现更快的工艺优化，减少实验工作量，并实现预测性可视化，同时保持高精度。这解决了传统方法需要大量实验和专家知识的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习为激光表面纹理技术提供了有前景的解决方案，能够克服工艺参数复杂相互关系的挑战，实现高效的过程优化和预测，减少对专家知识的依赖，提高工艺开发效率。

title: A CMOS-compatible, scalable and compact magnetoelectric spin-torque microwave detector
summary: The development of compact and highly sensitive microwave detectors compatible with complementary-metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) processes is an active research area but remains a major challenge in microwave technology. Spin-torque diodes (STDs) are emerging nanoscale spintronic devices capable of surpassing the theoretical thermodynamic sensitivity limits of Schottky diodes. However, their practical use in compact systems is limited by the need of external antennas or probes. Here, we demonstrate a magnetoelectric (ME) spin-torque microwave detector that monolithically integrates an ME antenna with a magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ). The device directly converts wireless electromagnetic signals into a DC output at sub-microwatt power levels, achieving a sensitivity greater than 90 kV/W, a noise equivalent power of 3 pW*Hz^-0.5, and a compact footprint of 0.4 mm^2. This performance is due to the nonlinear coupling between incoherent magnetization dynamics, driven by a DC current in the MTJ, and the combined effects of the microwave voltage and strain generated by the ME antenna under incident electromagnetic waves. We further show that this design is scalable, enabling the co-integration of an ME antenna with an array of MTJs. A detector incorporating four MTJs, for example, exhibits a sensitivity exceeding 400 kV/W. This work paves the way for a new generation of highly sensitive, compact and scalable microwave detectors that combine ME antennas and spintronic diodes.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了一种磁电自旋转矩微波探测器，将磁电天线与磁性隧道结单片集成，实现了高灵敏度、低噪声和小尺寸的无线微波检测。
AI.motivation: 开发与CMOS工艺兼容的紧凑型高灵敏度微波探测器是微波技术领域的重要挑战。传统自旋转矩二极管需要外部天线或探头，限制了其在紧凑系统中的实际应用。
AI.method: 设计了一种磁电自旋转矩微波探测器，将磁电天线与磁性隧道结单片集成。通过MTJ中的直流电流驱动非相干磁化动力学，与磁电天线在入射电磁波下产生的微波电压和应变效应非线性耦合，实现无线电磁信号到直流输出的直接转换。
AI.result: 器件在亚微瓦功率水平下实现大于90 kV/W的灵敏度、3 pW*Hz^-0.5的噪声等效功率和0.4 mm²的紧凑尺寸。通过集成4个MTJ的阵列，灵敏度可超过400 kV/W，展示了设计的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为新一代高灵敏度、紧凑且可扩展的微波探测器铺平了道路，结合了磁电天线和自旋电子二极管技术，有望推动微波检测技术的发展。

title: Perspective on a challenge: predicting the photochemistry of cyclobutanone
summary:
This Perspective is part of a Special Topic that explored the maturity of nonadiabatic molecular dynamics for predicting photochemical processes. In 2023, a prediction challenge was issued to the community of computational photochemists to simulate the photochemistry of cyclobutanone, photoexcited at 200 nm, and the resulting time-resolved MeV-UED signal. The challenge attracted 15 theoretical predictions from more than 70 researchers, employing a wide range of strategies for electronic structure and nonadiabatic molecular dynamics to predict the time-resolved MeV-UED signal before the experiment had been conducted at SLAC (Stanford, USA). The MeV-UED instrument at Shanghai Jiao Tong University was also used to provide a second independent time-resolved MeV-UED signal for the photochemistry of cyclobutanone.
  This Perspective discusses the various approaches and strategies used by the participants to predict the photochemistry of cyclobutanone. This work also summarizes the strengths and weaknesses of various methods used for photoexcitation, electronic structure, nonadiabatic dynamics, and calculation of observables, as agreed by the participants during a CECAM workshop dedicated to the results of the challenge and organized in Lausanne in April 2025. This Perspective also collects all the predicted time-resolved MeV-UED signals into a single figure, together with the experimental signal. This challenge (i) demonstrated the qualitative predictive power of nonadiabatic molecular dynamics and (ii) underscore the impact of electronic-structure theory on the outcome of the excited-state dynamics and the need for its careful benchmarking. This effort allowed the community to share practical strategies to perform nonadiabatic dynamics (discussed in the present Perspective) and constitutes a 'calibration' exercise for computational photochemistry.

AI.tldr: 该论文总结了2023年计算光化学界对环丁酮200nm光激发过程的时间分辨MeV-UED信号预测挑战，收集了15个理论预测并与实验数据对比，评估了非绝热分子动力学方法的预测能力。
AI.motivation: 评估非绝热分子动力学方法在预测光化学过程中的成熟度，通过环丁酮光化学预测挑战来测试不同计算方法的预测能力，为计算光化学提供基准校准。
AI.method: 组织了计算光化学预测挑战，收集了来自70多名研究者的15个理论预测，使用多种电子结构和非绝热分子动力学策略，预测时间分辨MeV-UED信号，并与SLAC和上海交通大学的实验数据进行对比。
AI.result: 挑战展示了非绝热分子动力学的定性预测能力，同时强调了电子结构理论对激发态动力学结果的重要影响。所有预测信号与实验信号汇总对比，揭示了不同方法的优缺点。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战证明了非绝热分子动力学的预测价值，强调了电子结构方法基准测试的重要性，为计算光化学提供了实用的非绝热动力学策略和校准参考。

title: Origin of multiple skyrmion phases in EuAl4
summary: The Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya (DM) interaction has been considered essential for skyrmion formation, however, the discovery of skyrmion lattices (SkLs) in nominally centrosymmetric materials where the DM interaction is forbidden, such as Eu(Ga$_{1-x}$Al$_x$)$_4$, has challenged this established view. Recent structural investigations of Eu(Ga$_{1-x}$Al$_x$)$_4$ have further complicated this issue by revealing that the charge-density wave breaks local symmetry, theoretically allowing DM interaction. This raises a fundamental question: are the complex magnetic phases driven by the DM interaction or by alternative mechanisms? Here, using soft-x-ray angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy, we determine the three-dimensional bulk electronic structure of Eu(Ga$_{1-x}$Al$_x$)$_4$, and elucidate the electronic origins of its rich magnetic orders. We directly observe an x-dependent Lifshitz transition leading to the emergence of a Fermi-surface pocket. Importantly, multiple nesting vectors derived from this pocket match the symmetries and periodicities of the multiple SkLs. Moreover, these nesting vectors can also account for other magnetic orders, such as the zero-field helical magnetism, suggesting a common electronic origin of the complex magnetic phases. These findings suggest that competing nesting-induced Ruderman-Kittel-Kasuya-Yosida interactions and their engineering can generate and control various SkLs and related topological spin textures.

AI.tldr: 在Eu(Ga1-xAlx)4中，通过软X射线角分辨光电子能谱发现Lifshitz转变产生新的费米面口袋，其多重嵌套矢量与多种斯格明子晶格对称性匹配，表明复杂磁相由嵌套诱导的RKKY相互作用驱动而非DM相互作用。
AI.motivation: 传统认为Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用是斯格明子形成的关键，但在中心对称材料Eu(Ga1-xAlx)4中发现斯格明子晶格挑战了这一观点。电荷密度波破坏局部对称性理论上允许DM相互作用，但复杂磁相究竟由DM相互作用还是其他机制驱动成为根本问题。
AI.method: 使用软X射线角分辨光电子能谱技术，确定Eu(Ga1-xAlx)4的三维体电子结构，阐明其丰富磁序的电子起源。直接观测到x依赖的Lifshitz转变导致费米面口袋的出现。
AI.result: 发现从新费米面口袋衍生的多重嵌套矢量与多种斯格明子晶格的对称性和周期性匹配。这些嵌套矢量也能解释其他磁序（如零场螺旋磁性），表明复杂磁相具有共同的电子起源。
AI.conclusion: 竞争性嵌套诱导的RKKY相互作用及其工程化可以产生和控制各种斯格明子晶格及相关拓扑自旋纹理，为复杂磁相提供了DM相互作用之外的替代机制。

title: Depth-Resolved Thermal Conductivity of HFCVD Diamond Films via Square-Pulsed Thermometry
summary: The integration of high-thermal-conductivity diamond films onto silicon carbide (SiC) substrates offers a promising pathway for thermal management in high-power electronic devices. Here, we investigate the depth-dependent thermal conductivity of a ~5 μm-thick diamond film grown on SiC by hot-filament chemical vapor deposition (HFCVD) using square-pulsed source (SPS) thermometry. Electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD) and transmission electron microscopy (TEM) reveal pronounced grain coarsening from the nucleation interface to the film surface. By combining frequency-dependent thermal penetration with a depth-resolved thermal transport model, we quantitatively reconstruct the thermal conductivity profile. The thermal conductivity increases sharply from ~60 W m^(-1) K^(-1) near the nucleation region to ~200 W m^(-1) K^(-1) at the surface, directly reflecting the underlying microstructural evolution. These results provide a physically grounded understanding of graded heat transport in HFCVD diamond and offer practical guidance for engineering diamond-based thermal management layers for next-generation power devices.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过SPS热测量技术，结合EBSD和TEM分析，揭示了HFCVD金刚石薄膜从SiC衬底界面到表面的热导率梯度变化（60到200 W/m·K），反映了晶粒粗化的微观结构演变。
AI.motivation: 高导热金刚石薄膜与SiC衬底的结合为高功率电子器件热管理提供了有前景的途径，但需要深入理解其深度依赖的热导率特性以优化热管理设计。
AI.method: 采用热丝化学气相沉积（HFCVD）在SiC衬底上生长~5 μm厚金刚石薄膜，使用方波脉冲源（SPS）热测量技术，结合电子背散射衍射（EBSD）和透射电子显微镜（TEM）分析微观结构，通过频率相关热穿透与深度分辨热传输模型定量重建热导率分布。
AI.result: 热导率从成核区域附近的~60 W m^(-1) K^(-1)急剧增加到表面的~200 W m^(-1) K^(-1)，直接反映了从界面到表面的晶粒粗化微观结构演变。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为HFCVD金刚石中的梯度热传输提供了物理基础理解，并为下一代功率器件金刚石基热管理层的工程设计提供了实用指导。

title: Gate-Reconfigurable Single- and Double-Dot Transport in Trilayer MoSe2
summary: We report gate-controlled quantum-dot transport in a trilayer MoSe2 device that combines a graphite back gate beneath the active region, a separate global gate for conductive access regions, and local top finger gates. In the low-backgate regime, bias spectroscopy shows regular Coulomb-blockade diamonds characteristic of single-dot transport. As backgate is increased, additional low-bias structure develops beyond a simple single-dot pattern, indicating that the electrostatic landscape is reshaped and that a second dot becomes active in transport. In the higher-backgate regime, plunger-gate tuning and two-gate measurements establish a gate-reconfigurable double-dot configuration with two non-equivalent dots whose relative alignment and interdot coupling evolve with gate voltage. These results indicate that trilayer MoSe2 supports electrically reconfigurable single- and double-dot transport in the present device architecture.

AI.tldr: 该论文报道了在MoSe2三层器件中实现了栅极可重构的单量子点和双量子点输运，通过多栅极调控实现了从单量子点到双量子点的电学重构。
AI.motivation: 研究MoSe2三层材料中量子点输运的可重构性，探索新型二维材料在量子器件中的应用潜力，特别是实现电学可调控的单量子点和双量子点系统。
AI.method: 使用具有石墨背栅、全局栅和局部顶指栅的三层MoSe2器件结构，通过偏压谱学、库仑阻塞钻石测量、栅极调谐和双栅测量等技术分析量子点输运特性。
AI.result: 在低背栅区观察到规则的单量子点库仑阻塞钻石；增加背栅电压后出现额外的低偏压结构，表明第二个量子点被激活；在高背栅区建立了栅极可重构的双量子点配置，两个非等效量子点的相对对齐和耦合随栅压变化。
AI.conclusion: MoSe2三层材料在当前器件架构中支持电学可重构的单量子点和双量子点输运，为基于二维材料的可重构量子器件提供了重要基础。

title: Atomistic Modeling of Methane and Carbon Dioxide Structure I Gas Hydrates Under Pressure: Guest Effects and Properties
summary: Gas hydrates are potential candidates in future energy sources while simultaneously providing structures with extensive applications in carbon capture and storage, gas transport, and important separation processes. Prior research in the field considers the dynamics of the water molecule backbone in particular.
