We investigated the pressure-enthalpy landscape and mechanical stability envelope of sI methane and carbon dioxide hydrates simulated using DFT. We investigated the effect of the revPBE + DFT-D2 and the SCAN + rVV10 and their treatment of the exchange correlation interactions. We examined the zero pressure material properties, finding that revPBE comparatively underbinds the interactions, causing more flexible structures with large equilibrium volumes. Under pressure, the carbon dioxide molecule was found to align itself parallel to the hexagonal faces of the large cage despite the functional used. Additionally, the property differences are caused by the ability of the carbon dioxide molecule to rotate and disperse the changes in the energy landscape in ways that methane molecules cannot. This computational methodology describes the elastic stability of gas hydrate, marginal stability, and critical differences across important molecular interactions, confirming experimentally observed restrictions in guest molecule rotations and novel pressure behaviors under hydrostatic loads

AI.tldr: 使用DFT模拟研究sI型甲烷和二氧化碳水合物的压力-焓景观和机械稳定性，比较revPBE+DFT-D2和SCAN+rVV10泛函对交换相关相互作用的处理差异
AI.motivation: 天然气水合物是未来潜在能源，在碳捕集与封存、气体运输和分离过程中有重要应用。先前研究主要关注水分子骨架动力学，本研究旨在通过DFT模拟探究sI型甲烷和二氧化碳水合物的压力-焓景观和机械稳定性
AI.method: 使用密度泛函理论(DFT)模拟sI型甲烷和二氧化碳水合物，比较revPBE+DFT-D2和SCAN+rVV10两种泛函对交换相关相互作用的处理，分析零压力材料性质、压力下的分子取向和能量景观变化
AI.result: revPBE泛函相对弱化相互作用，导致更灵活的结构和更大的平衡体积；压力下二氧化碳分子平行于大笼六边形面排列；二氧化碳分子能通过旋转和分散能量景观变化来适应压力，而甲烷分子不能；计算揭示了水合物的弹性稳定性、临界稳定性和重要分子相互作用的差异
AI.conclusion: 该计算方法描述了气体水合物的弹性稳定性、临界稳定性和重要分子相互作用的关键差异，证实了实验观察到的客体分子旋转限制和静水载荷下的新型压力行为

title: Robust topological surface states in skyrmion-host magnets Eu(Ga,Al)4: evidence for dual topology
summary: The interplay between real-space topology such as magnetic skyrmions and momentum-space topology characterized by topological surface states (TSSs) is predicted to realize novel phenomena and functionalities, yet materials hosting both topologies are scarce. Skyrmion-hosting helimagnet family EuGa$_2$Al$_2$ and EuAl$_4$ has been a prime candidate for such a dual-topology system, but conclusive evidence for its momentum-space topology has remained elusive. We provide this evidence by directly observing TSSs that stem from bulk Dirac nodal lines using high-resolution angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy. These TSSs are exceptionally robust against various perturbations such as a 2$\times$1 surface reconstruction, a chemical change in the termination of the crystal surface, and the onset of helical antiferromagnetic order. Crucially, below the Neel temperature, we observe replica bands driven by the magnetic ordering. Moreover, we demonstrate clear surface-termination dependence of this magneto-topological coupling. Our findings establish Eu(Ga$_{1-x}$Al$_x$)$_4$ as a dual-topology material and offer a rare platform to explore and control the interaction between the two fundamental topological realms.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次在Eu(Ga₁₋ₓAlₓ)₄材料中直接观测到拓扑表面态，证实其为同时具有实空间拓扑（磁斯格明子）和动量空间拓扑（拓扑表面态）的双拓扑材料。
AI.motivation: 同时具有实空间拓扑（如磁斯格明子）和动量空间拓扑（拓扑表面态）的材料极为稀少，EuGa₂Al₂和EuAl₄被认为是这种双拓扑系统的候选材料，但一直缺乏动量空间拓扑的确凿证据。
AI.method: 使用高分辨率角分辨光电子能谱直接观测拓扑表面态，研究其在各种扰动下的稳定性，包括表面重构、晶体表面终止化学变化和螺旋反铁磁序的起始。
AI.result: 直接观测到源自体相狄拉克节线的拓扑表面态，这些表面态对各种扰动表现出异常鲁棒性。在尼尔温度以下观察到由磁序驱动的复制带，并展示了这种磁拓扑耦合对表面终止的明显依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究确立了Eu(Ga₁₋ₓAlₓ)₄为双拓扑材料，为探索和控制两个基本拓扑领域之间的相互作用提供了一个稀有平台。

title: Kinetic Arrest of a First Order Phase Transition
summary: We report a phenomenological theory for the kinetic arrest (KA) of a first-order phase transition, taking the Mott metal-insulator transition in $V_2O_3$ as a test case. By defining a order parameter $φ$ related to the monoclinic distortion of the high temperature metallic and mapping its Time-Dependent Ginzburg-Landau (TDGL) dynamics onto a disorder-influenced Imry-Wortis landscape, we derive a universal transcendental condition for the mechanism of the kinetic arrest. We demonstrate that epitaxial substrate-induced clamping in (001)-oriented $V_2O_3$ thin films elevates the elastic activation barriers, trapping the high-symmetry corundum phase down to 4.2~K. This structural suppression of the insulating state robustly explains the observed hysteretic $V$-$I$ switching a hallmark of memristive behaviour. Our work identifies a "Mott-Glass" as a structurally arrested non-equilibrium state in the strained thin-film of V$_2$O$_3$. Our work provides a predictive framework for engineering strain-tuned neuromorphic synapses.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种描述一级相变动力学阻滞的理论框架，以V₂O₃的Mott金属-绝缘体相变为案例，解释了应变薄膜中结构抑制导致的"莫特玻璃"态和忆阻行为。
AI.motivation: 研究一级相变（特别是Mott金属-绝缘体相变）在动力学上被阻滞的机制，解释V₂O₃薄膜中观察到的相变抑制现象和忆阻开关行为。
AI.method: 建立唯象理论，定义与单斜畸变相关的序参量φ，将时间依赖的Ginzburg-Landau动力学映射到受无序影响的Imry-Wortis势能景观，推导动力学阻滞的普适超越条件。
AI.result: 发现(001)取向V₂O₃薄膜中外延衬底诱导的夹持效应提高了弹性激活势垒，将高对称性刚玉相捕获至4.2K，结构上抑制了绝缘态，解释了观察到的滞后V-I开关（忆阻行为）。
AI.conclusion: 识别出"莫特玻璃"作为V₂O₃应变薄膜中结构阻滞的非平衡态，为工程化应变调控的神经形态突触提供了预测性框架。

title: Fidelity of Machine Learned Potentials: Quantitative Assessment for Protonated Oxalate
summary: There has been a veritable explosion of methods and software to perform machine-learned regression on datasets of electronic energies and forces to develop high-dimensional machine learned potential energy surfaces (ML-PESs). A major, but not deeply-studied aspect is how well different ML-PESs represent the same dataset on which they are trained, beyond the standard fitting precision metrics. Here, this is examined in detail using several ''stress tests'', for two widely applied machine-learned potential approaches. One is based on permutationally invariant polynomial (PIP) linear least square regression and the other is the message-passing neural network PhysNet approach. These potentials and dipole moment surfaces are used in VSCF/VCI calculations of vibrational energies and wavefunctions. The energies from the two PESs are directly compared as are the IR spectra. In addition, tunneling splittings for the hydrogen transfer between two equivalent structures are reported from using three methods: ring polymer instanton theory, diffusion Monte Carlo simulations, and the $Q_{im}$ path method. These calculations require the evaluation of on the order of one billion energies that are widely dispersed in the 15-dimensional configurational space. The two PESs yield results for these quantities in excellent agreement with each other.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了两种机器学习势能面方法（PIP线性回归和PhysNet神经网络）在相同数据集上的表现，通过振动光谱、隧道分裂等"压力测试"验证了两种方法结果的高度一致性。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习势能面方法发展迅速，但不同方法在相同数据集上的表现差异尚未深入研究。本研究旨在超越标准拟合精度指标，深入评估不同ML-PES方法对同一数据集的表示能力。
AI.method: 采用两种广泛应用的机器学习势能面方法：基于置换不变多项式的线性最小二乘回归（PIP）和消息传递神经网络PhysNet。通过多种"压力测试"进行比较：1）VSCF/VCI计算振动能量和波函数；2）直接比较两种PES的能量和红外光谱；3）使用三种方法（环聚合物瞬子理论、扩散蒙特卡洛模拟、Q_im路径方法）计算氢转移的隧道分裂。
AI.result: 两种势能面方法在需要评估约10亿个能量的15维构型空间中，对振动能量、红外光谱和隧道分裂等关键物理量给出了高度一致的结果，证明了不同ML-PES方法在相同数据集上的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 尽管采用不同的机器学习方法（线性回归vs神经网络），两种势能面对同一数据集的表现高度一致，这增强了机器学习势能面在复杂量子动力学计算中的可信度，为ML-PES的可靠性提供了重要验证。

title: Unconventional entanglement scaling and quantum criticality in the long-range spin-one Heisenberg chain with single-ion anisotropy
summary: Long-range interactions can fundamentally reshape the low-energy properties of low-dimensional quantum matter, altering both continuous symmetry breaking and topological phenomena. However, their impact on the quantum criticality separating these regimes remains poorly understood. We determine the ground-state phase diagram and critical properties of the spin-one Heisenberg chain with single-ion anisotropy and staggered antiferromagnetic power-law interactions, using matrix-product state (MPS) calculations complemented by high-order series expansions (pCUT+MC). Such long-range, non-frustrated interactions circumvent the Hohenberg-Mermin-Wagner theorem, thereby stabilizing continuous symmetry breaking (CSB) phases in direct competition with the Haldane phase. We map out the resulting phase diagram and analyze the entanglement entropy scaling behavior in the U(1) and SU(2) CSB phases, finding logarithmic corrections beyond the short-range, universal contributions expected from linearly dispersed Goldstone modes. We further characterize all critical boundaries through finite-size scaling of either the entanglement entropy or the staggered magnetization. In particular, the large-D-to-U(1)-CSB transition exhibits unconventional, continuously varying critical exponents as a function of the long-range decay exponent with a strong dependence on the imposed boundary conditions leading to distinct finite-size scalings for sufficiently long-range potentials. Remarkably, the Haldane-to-U(1)-CSB transition likewise displays unconventional quantum criticality with distinct continuously varying critical exponents. Our work positions this model as a target for near-term atomic platforms with tunable long-range couplings and exhibiting natural single-ion anisotropy, offering a minimal playground for exploring the interplay between long-range interactions, continuous symmetry breaking, and topology.

AI.tldr: 研究长程相互作用对一维自旋-1海森堡链量子临界性的影响，发现长程作用能稳定连续对称破缺相，并与Haldane相竞争，产生非常规量子临界行为。
AI.motivation: 长程相互作用对低维量子系统的低能性质有根本性影响，但对其在量子临界性中的作用理解不足。本研究旨在探索长程相互作用如何影响连续对称破缺与拓扑相之间的量子临界行为。
AI.method: 使用矩阵乘积态（MPS）计算结合高阶级数展开（pCUT+MC）方法，研究具有单离子各向异性和交错反铁磁幂律长程相互作用的自旋-1海森堡链的基态相图和临界性质。
AI.result: 长程非阻挫相互作用能够绕过Hohenberg-Mermin-Wagner定理，稳定连续对称破缺相并与Haldane相竞争。在U(1)和SU(2)连续对称破缺相中发现了超越短程普适贡献的对数修正。所有临界边界都通过纠缠熵或交错磁化的有限尺寸标度进行表征，发现多个相变表现出非常规的、连续变化的临界指数。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为具有可调长程耦合和自然单离子各向异性的近原子平台提供了理想的研究目标，为探索长程相互作用、连续对称破缺和拓扑之间的相互作用提供了最小化平台。

title: Tuning Structure and Magnetism in Large-Scale 2D Ferromagnet Fe$_3$GeTe$_2$ through Ni Doping
summary: Two-dimensional ferromagnets with strong perpendicular magnetic anisotropy exhibit magnetic order down to the monolayer thickness, beneficial for energy-efficient spintronic devices. In this work, molecular beam epitaxy has been employed to realize controlled Ni-doping in Fe$_{3}$GeTe$_{2}$ (FGT) epitaxial films. MBE not only enables a large-scale growth of 2D films, but also allows a precise control over thickness and doping. X-ray diffraction and scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM) reveal the formation of high-quality epitaxial films of pristine and Ni-doped FGT on graphene via van der Waals (vdW) epitaxy. Integrated differential phase contrast STEM images further provide in-depth information on Ni substitution and intercalation into the vdW gaps. Ni incorporation in doped films results in the shrinking of both in-plane and out-of-plane lattice parameters. Superconducting Quantum Interference Device, Hall, and X-ray magnetic circular dichroism measurements were utilized to probe the ferromagnetic properties of the films. Due to both Ni substitution and intercalation into the vdW gaps for Ni-doped FGT films, we observed a suppression of PMA and a drastic reduction in the Curie temperature down to 50 K. Our density functional theory based calculations of structural and magnetic properties further supports and provide deep insights into the variations of magnetic exchange interaction parameters and atom-projected magnetocrystalline anisotropy energies due to Ni doping to understand the experimental observations.

AI.tldr: 通过分子束外延实现Fe₃GeTe₂薄膜的Ni掺杂，研究发现Ni掺杂导致垂直磁各向异性抑制和居里温度大幅降低至50K。
AI.motivation: 二维铁磁体具有强垂直磁各向异性，在单层厚度下仍能保持磁有序，这对于节能自旋电子器件非常有利。本研究旨在通过Ni掺杂调控Fe₃GeTe₂薄膜的磁性能。
AI.method: 采用分子束外延技术生长原始和Ni掺杂的Fe₃GeTe₂外延薄膜。通过X射线衍射、扫描透射电子显微镜、超导量子干涉仪、霍尔效应和X射线磁圆二色性测量表征薄膜结构和磁性。结合密度泛函理论计算分析Ni掺杂对磁交换相互作用和各向异性能的影响。
AI.result: Ni掺杂导致面内和面外晶格参数收缩。由于Ni的替代和插入vdW间隙，观察到垂直磁各向异性被抑制，居里温度大幅降低至50K。理论计算支持实验观察，揭示了Ni掺杂引起的磁交换相互作用参数和原子投影磁晶各向异性能的变化。
AI.conclusion: 分子束外延成功实现了Fe₃GeTe₂薄膜的Ni掺杂控制。Ni掺杂显著改变了薄膜的磁性能，特别是抑制了垂直磁各向异性和降低了居里温度，这为二维铁磁体的性能调控提供了重要途径。

title: Quantum dynamics of coupled quasinormal modes and quantum emitters interacting via finite-delay propagating photons
summary: A time-dependent theory for the interactions between spatially separated lossy cavities in a homogeneous background medium using quantized quasinormal modes (QNMs) is presented. The cavities interact via a bath of traveling photons, described by non-bosonic operators that are orthogonal to the open-cavity QNMs. The retarded (i.e., time-delayed) inter-cavity dynamics are fully described by system-bath correlation functions, in which the emission from one cavity appears as the input field for another. Coupling between quantum emitters (described as two-level systems), placed inside a cavity or embedded in an external medium, and the electromagnetic field (cavity modes and bath photons) is included in the theory, which gives rise to both bath-mediated and QNM-mediated interactions between the emitters.

AI.tldr: 提出基于量子化准正态模式(QNMs)的时间相关理论，描述均匀背景介质中空间分离损耗腔体间的相互作用，包括腔体间通过行波光子浴的延迟相互作用以及量子发射体与电磁场的耦合。
AI.motivation: 传统腔量子电动力学理论在处理空间分离的损耗腔体相互作用时存在局限，特别是在考虑时间延迟效应和非玻色子算子描述方面。需要发展一个统一的理论框架来描述腔体间通过光子浴的延迟相互作用以及量子发射体与电磁场的耦合。
AI.method: 采用量子化准正态模式(QNMs)理论，将腔体相互作用建模为通过行波光子浴的耦合，使用非玻色子算子描述光子浴。通过系统-浴关联函数完全描述延迟的腔间动力学，并将量子发射体（二能级系统）与电磁场（腔模和浴光子）的耦合纳入理论框架。
AI.result: 建立了能够描述空间分离损耗腔体间延迟相互作用的统一理论框架，该理论能够同时处理腔体间的光子浴介导相互作用和QNM介导相互作用，以及量子发射体与电磁场的耦合。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为研究开放腔量子系统中的延迟相互作用提供了完整的理论框架，特别适用于处理空间分离损耗腔体间的量子动力学，为量子网络和分布式量子系统研究提供了理论基础。

title: Efficient Implementation of Relativistic Coupled Cluster Linear Response Theory in Combination with Perturbation Sensitive Natural Spinors and Cholesky Decomposition Treatment of Two-electron Integrals
summary: We present an efficient implementation of the low-cost linear-response coupled-cluster singles and doubles (LR-CCSD) method for computing static and frequency-dependent polarizabilities in systems with significant relativistic and electron-correlation effects. The approach employs X2C-based Hamiltonians (X2CAMF and X2CMP) and incorporates Cholesky decomposition to reduce memory requirements. In the current implementation, costly three- and four-external index integrals are generated on the fly, eliminating the need for their storage. Benchmark results indicate that the X2CMP Hamiltonian provides more consistent performance than X2CAMF, particularly for large and highly augmented basis sets. The proposed FNS++CD-X2CMP-LR-CCSD method shows excellent agreement with four-component reference values across a wide range of systems. Additionally, different strategies for constructing the FNS++ basis were assessed, and an averaged density approach was found to offer a favorable balance between accuracy and computational cost. On average, about 73% of the virtual spinor space is removed, demonstrating the efficiency and consistency of the FNS++ density-based truncation approach. The present implementation enables accurate and scalable relativistic response calculations for large molecular systems, as demonstrated by the calculation of the static polarizability of the Uranium Hexafluoride complex with a triple-zeta basis set more than 1400 basis functions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的低成本线性响应耦合簇单双激发方法（LR-CCSD），用于计算具有显著相对论和电子相关效应的系统的静态和频率依赖极化率，采用X2C哈密顿量和Cholesky分解降低内存需求。
AI.motivation: 需要开发一种能够高效处理具有显著相对论和电子相关效应的大分子系统的极化率计算方法，传统方法在计算大型系统时面临内存和计算成本挑战。
AI.method: 采用X2C基哈密顿量（X2CAMF和X2CMP），结合Cholesky分解减少内存需求，实时生成三中心和四中心积分避免存储开销，并开发FNS++密度截断方法减少约73%的虚拟旋量空间。
AI.result: X2CMP哈密顿量比X2CAMF表现更一致，特别是在大型和高增广基组情况下；FNS++CD-X2CMP-LR-CCSD方法与四分量参考值在多种系统中表现出色；平均密度方法在精度和计算成本间取得良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了准确且可扩展的相对论响应计算，成功应用于具有1400多个基函数的六氟化铀配合物的静态极化率计算，为大型分子系统的相对论响应计算提供了高效解决方案。

title: Particle Dynamics in Constant Synthetic Non-Abelian Fields
summary: Yang-Mills theory has extended well beyond its original role in describing the strong force and now emerges as an effective theory in condensed matter, ultracold atomic, and photonic systems. In these systems, the theory has been successful in explaining phenomena such as the spin-Hall effect, spin transport, and controlling the polarisation of light. Moreover, the ability to engineer and control synthetic non-Abelian gauge fields in these systems enables us to explore aspects of gauge dynamics inaccessible to high-energy experiments. In all the above mentioned cases, the state of the system evolves in an effective external Yang-Mills field. Thus, the study of test particle dynamics in such background fields is interesting in both the classical and quantum mechanical regimes. The background non-Abelian (color) gauge fields considered in this study are constant, and they generate uniform color magnetic fields or combined color electric and magnetic fields -- which are relevant configurations. Despite the apparent simplicity of these backgrounds, the coupled evolution of real space motion and internal color degrees of freedom results in rich, nontrivial behaviour that is qualitatively distinct from the electrodynamic (Abelian) case, such as unbounded trajectories in a constant color magnetic field. In particular, particle trajectories encode signatures of the underlying gauge sources. Finally, the classical dynamics presented in this paper serves as a precursor to the complete quantum mechanical treatment to follow.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在恒定杨-米尔斯背景场中测试粒子的经典动力学，揭示非阿贝尔规范场中粒子轨迹的丰富行为，为后续量子力学处理奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 杨-米尔斯理论已扩展到凝聚态、冷原子和光子系统中，成为描述自旋霍尔效应、自旋输运等现象的有效理论。在这些系统中，可以工程化合成非阿贝尔规范场，探索高能实验中无法触及的规范动力学。研究在外部杨-米尔斯背景场中测试粒子的经典动力学具有重要意义。
AI.method: 研究恒定非阿贝尔（色）规范场中的测试粒子动力学，这些场产生均匀色磁场或色电磁组合场。分析真实空间运动与内部色自由度耦合演化，重点关注与电动力学（阿贝尔）情况不同的非平凡行为。
AI.result: 即使在看似简单的恒定背景场中，真实空间运动与内部色自由度的耦合演化导致丰富、非平凡的行为，与电动力学情况有质的区别。例如，在恒定色磁场中会出现无界轨迹。粒子轨迹编码了底层规范源的签名特征。
AI.conclusion: 杨-米尔斯背景场中测试粒子的经典动力学展现出与阿贝尔情况显著不同的丰富行为，这些经典动力学研究为后续完整的量子力学处理提供了重要基础，有助于理解非阿贝尔规范场的独特物理特性。

title: Electrochemical Performance of Gold Monolayers for Lithium-Ion Batteries: A First Principles Study
summary: Being motivated by recent synthesis of a monolayer of gold, named goldene, from the nano-laminated ternary ceramic phase of Ti3AuC2, we are proposing two phases of goldene viz. goldene-I and goldene-II as anode material for Lithium-Ion batteries using first principles study. This innovative goldene-I monolayer, composed of triangular motifs of gold atoms, exhibits remarkable properties owing to its unique geometric configuration and intrinsic stability. In contrast, a theoretical structure known as goldene-II, featuring a combination of triangular and hexagonal motifs, has been proposed. This structure possesses intrinsic, periodically distributed pores among Au atoms and demonstrates structural integrity and mechanical robustness, even under lithium adsorption. The electronic band spectra and projected density of states reveal the metallic nature of both phases of goldene. Electrochemical evaluations reveal that goldene-II offers favorable lithium-ion adsorption energies, efficient charge transfer, and volumetric capacities. Goldene-I achieves a volumetric capacity of 0.713 Ah/cm3, while goldene-II reaches 0.783 Ah/cm3, confirming its high suitability for lithium storage volumetric capability. Moreover, goldene-I has an ultra-low barrier height of 15 meV, which supports rapid lithium-ion transport.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过第一性原理计算提出两种金烯相（goldene-I和goldene-II）作为锂离子电池负极材料，评估了它们的电化学性能。
AI.motivation: 受近期从Ti3AuC2三元陶瓷相合成单层金烯（goldene）的启发，研究两种金烯相作为锂离子电池负极材料的潜力。
AI.method: 使用第一性原理研究，分析两种金烯相的结构特性：goldene-I由金原子三角形图案组成，goldene-II由三角形和六边形图案组合构成并具有周期性孔隙。
AI.result: 两种金烯相均显示金属性质。goldene-I体积容量为0.713 Ah/cm³，扩散势垒仅15 meV；goldene-II体积容量达0.783 Ah/cm³，具有有利的锂离子吸附能和电荷转移特性。
AI.conclusion: 两种金烯相特别是goldene-II展现出作为高性能锂离子电池负极材料的潜力，具有高体积容量和优异的锂离子传输性能。

title: Remote Moiré Modulation of Decoupled Dirac Subsystems in Twisted Trilayer Graphene
summary: Moiré superlattices are generally assumed to act only at the interface where lattice mismatch or twist occurs. Here, we study charge transport in large-angle helical twisted trilayer graphene, where interlayer tunneling is strongly reduced. When only the top monolayer graphene is aligned with hBN, the electronic response reorganizes into a moiré-modulated monolayer and a remaining twisted bilayer graphene subsystem. Despite the absence of any explicit structural moiré in the twisted bilayer, we observe satellite-like features in its electronic response that run parallel to the primary spectrum and are locked to the density scale of the hBN/graphene moiré. These findings indicate that a moiré potential may not be confined to its structural interface and can, through electrostatic coupling, influence a spatially separated Dirac subsystem even in the absence of strong interlayer tunneling.

AI.tldr: 研究发现莫尔超晶格势能可通过静电耦合影响空间分离的狄拉克子系统，即使在没有强层间隧穿的情况下
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为莫尔超晶格只作用于晶格失配或扭曲的界面，本研究探索莫尔势能是否能够超越结构界面影响其他子系统
AI.method: 研究大角度螺旋扭曲三层石墨烯中的电荷输运，其中只有顶部单层石墨烯与hBN对齐，形成莫尔调制的单层和扭曲双层子系统
AI.result: 在扭曲双层子系统中观察到卫星状特征，这些特征与主谱平行且锁定在hBN/石墨烯莫尔密度尺度上，表明莫尔势能可通过静电耦合影响空间分离的子系统
AI.conclusion: 莫尔势能不仅局限于其结构界面，还能通过静电耦合影响空间分离的狄拉克子系统，即使在没有强层间隧穿的情况下

title: EOM-fpCCSD: An Accurate Alternative to EOM-CCSD for Doubly Excited and Charge-Transfer States
summary: We introduce a new equation-of-motion coupled-cluster method based on a pair coupled-cluster doubles (pCCD) reference, termed frozen-pair EOM-CCSD (EOM-fpCCSD). This approach combines the computational efficiency of the pCCD ansatz with a dynamical correlation correction, enabling a reliable description of electronically excited states within the EOM framework. The method has been implemented in the open-source PyBEST software package. Its performance is systematically benchmarked against standard EOM-CCSD and its pair-tailored variant (EOM-ptCCSD), using both canonical Hartree-Fock and pCCD natural orbitals. For charge-transfer (CT) excitations taken from the QUEST database, EOM-fpCCSD yields excitation energies very close to those of EOM-CCSD, outperforming EOM-ptCCSD, as well as to the theoretical best estimates (TBEs). Working within the localized pCCD natural orbital basis allows us to determine the directed CT character, which quantifies the directed charge flow from one molecular domain to another. Numerical results show that EOM-fpCCSD, EOM-CCSD, and EOM-ptCCSD provide nearly identical descriptions of the directed CT character, despite changes in excitation energies. The true advantage of EOM-fpCCSD becomes evident for the challenging QUEST subset of doubly excited states. While EOM-ptCCSD performs similarly to standard EOM-CCSD, EOM-fpCCSD significantly outperforms both methods for these problematic states compared to TBEs. In addition to improving the accuracy of excitation energies, EOM-fpCCSD also converges for several states that standard EOM-CCSD and EOM-ptCCSD fail to converge. These results demonstrate that EOM-fpCCSD offers a promising and computationally efficient route toward a more accurate description of complex electronic excitations.

AI.tldr: 提出基于pCCD参考的EOM-fpCCSD方法，结合pCCD计算效率与动态相关校正，用于电子激发态描述，在电荷转移和双激发态方面表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统EOM-CCSD方法在描述复杂电子激发态（特别是双激发态）时存在局限性，需要更高效且准确的方法来可靠描述电子激发态。
AI.method: 基于pCCD参考的EOM-CCSD方法（EOM-fpCCSD），结合pCCD计算效率与动态相关校正，使用pCCD自然轨道，在PyBEST软件中实现。
AI.result: EOM-fpCCSD在电荷转移激发方面与EOM-CCSD结果接近，优于EOM-ptCCSD；在双激发态方面显著优于EOM-CCSD和EOM-ptCCSD，且收敛性更好。
AI.conclusion: EOM-fpCCSD提供了一条计算高效且准确描述复杂电子激发的有前景途径，特别是在处理双激发态和改善收敛性方面具有优势。

title: Heavy fermion $\textit{d-f}$ hybrid and the SmB$_6$ low temperature phase
summary: In this Letter we theoretically study physical properties of a model of heavy fermion $d-f$ hybrid. In the studied model two species of fermions have dispersions with different masses, one being much heavier than the other. Hybridization between the fermions at the crossing point of their dispersions doesn't open a true insulating gap leaving a heavy fermion $d-f$ hybrid at the Fermi level. As a result, our theoretical model qualitatively explains experiments on the low-temperature phase of the SmB$_6$. These are the saturation of the resistance, linear in temperature specific heat, and frequency dependence of the optical conductivity. Calculated optical conductivity shows a broadened peak at the twice the hybridization value as well as a low frequency tail.

AI.tldr: 该理论研究了一个重费米子d-f杂化模型，其中两种费米子具有不同质量，较重的与较轻的杂化在色散交叉点，但未形成真正的绝缘隙，而是在费米能级留下重费米子d-f杂化态，从而定性地解释了SmB₆低温相的实验现象。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是建立一个理论模型来解释SmB₆低温相的实验现象，包括电阻饱和、比热与温度线性关系以及光学电导率的频率依赖性。这些现象表明存在一种特殊的重费米子d-f杂化态，而非传统的绝缘隙。
AI.method: 采用理论模型研究重费米子d-f杂化系统。模型中包含两种具有不同质量的费米子（一种远重于另一种），在它们色散交叉点处发生杂化。分析这种杂化不形成真正绝缘隙的情况，而是产生重费米子d-f杂化态。
AI.result: 模型成功定性地解释了SmB₆低温相的实验现象：电阻饱和、线性温度依赖的比热、以及光学电导率的频率依赖性。计算的光学电导率显示在约两倍杂化值处存在展宽的峰，以及低频拖尾。
AI.conclusion: 该重费米子d-f杂化模型为理解SmB₆低温相提供了理论框架，表明杂化不形成绝缘隙而是产生重费米子杂化态，这解释了实验观测到的独特输运和热力学性质。

title: Symmetry breaking structural relaxation and optical transitions of native defects and carbon impurities in LiGa$_5$O$_8$
summary: LiGa$_5$O$_8$ in a spinel type structure has recently been claimed to be an unintentional p-type ultra-wide-band-gap oxide semiconductor. While previous computational work did not yet identify the origin of p-type doping and in fact predicted insulating behavior by compensation of deep acceptors by shallow donors, defect characterization in terms of its optical signatures remains important. Rather than focusing on thermodynamics transition levels, as in earlier work, this present paper focuses on the vertical transitions in a defect configuration diagram of defects in different charge states, representing absorption and emission processes involving carrier capture/emission from/to band edges. In addition, the structural relaxation of several native defects is revisited by allowing for more complex symmetry-breaking distortions in an effort to reconcile conflicting results in the previous literature. Special attention is given to the Li vacancy because it is the shallowest native acceptor. For this defect, the previously reported transition levels are revised on the basis of symmetry-breaking relaxations. The structural relaxations, band structures, and densities of states are compared between the symmetry-broken polaronic and symmetry-conserving non-polaronic states. Finally, we also study carbon impurities, which are likely to originate from growth methods involving organic precursors.

AI.tldr: 本文重新研究LiGa5O8中的缺陷，重点关注垂直跃迁过程而非热力学跃迁能级，特别研究了Li空位和碳杂质，通过对称性破缺弛豫修正了先前结果。
AI.motivation: LiGa5O8被认为是一种p型超宽带隙氧化物半导体，但先前计算预测其为绝缘体，且缺陷起源不明。需要重新研究缺陷的光学特征和结构弛豫，特别是Li空位和可能的碳杂质。
AI.method: 采用缺陷构型图中的垂直跃迁方法研究吸收和发射过程，允许更复杂的对称性破缺结构弛豫，重新计算Li空位的跃迁能级，并研究碳杂质的影响。
AI.result: 通过对称性破缺弛豫修正了Li空位的跃迁能级，比较了对称性破缺极化子态和对称性保持非极化子态的结构弛豫、能带结构和态密度，分析了碳杂质的可能影响。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了LiGa5O8缺陷光学特征的更准确描述，特别是Li空位的修正跃迁能级，为理解该材料的p型导电机制和缺陷表征提供了新见解。

title: Torsion-induced confinement and tunable nonlinear optical gain in a mesoscopic electron system
summary: We investigate the optical response of a conduction electron in a helically twisted mesoscopic medium containing a screw dislocation and a uniform torsional background, in the presence of an axial magnetic field and an Aharonov--Bohm flux. We show that the coupling between longitudinal motion and the geometric background produces an effective in-plane confinement, allowing bound states to emerge without the need for an external radial potential. Exact analytical solutions are obtained for the energy spectrum and radial wave functions, and these results are used to evaluate linear and third-order nonlinear absorption, changes in the refractive index, the photoionization cross section, and the oscillator strength. The combined action of torsion, magnetic field, and topological defect increases the interlevel spacing, compresses the radial electronic distribution, and breaks the dynamical symmetry between opposite angular-momentum channels, leading to strongly asymmetric and state-resolved optical spectra. Under intense optical excitation, the nonlinear contribution can overcome linear absorption, driving the system into a negative-absorption regime and enabling geometry-controlled optical gain. These results establish torsion and defect engineering as effective tools for tuning confinement, resonant energies, and selective amplification in mesoscopic nanophotonic platforms operating in the mid-infrared and terahertz ranges.

AI.tldr: 研究螺旋扭曲介观介质中传导电子的光学响应，发现几何背景与纵向运动的耦合产生有效平面约束，无需外部径向势即可形成束缚态，可用于调控中红外和太赫兹范围的光学增益。
AI.motivation: 探索在存在螺旋位错和均匀扭转背景的介观介质中，结合轴向磁场和Aharonov-Bohm通量，如何通过扭转和缺陷工程调控电子约束和光学响应，为纳米光子平台提供新的调控手段。
AI.method: 在螺旋扭曲介观介质中考虑传导电子，分析几何背景与纵向运动的耦合效应，获得能量谱和径向波函数的精确解析解，并计算线性/非线性吸收、折射率变化、光电离截面和振子强度。
AI.result: 扭转、磁场和拓扑缺陷的共同作用增大了能级间距，压缩了径向电子分布，打破了角动量通道间的动力学对称性，导致强烈不对称和状态分辨的光谱。强光激发下非线性贡献可超越线性吸收，实现负吸收和几何控制的光学增益。
AI.conclusion: 扭转和缺陷工程是调控介观纳米光子平台中约束、共振能量和选择性放大的有效工具，特别适用于中红外和太赫兹范围的操作，为几何控制的光学增益提供了新途径。

title: Probing spinon interactions in the spin-1 bilinear-biquadratic chain
summary: We study the dynamical spin and nematic correlations in the bilinear-biquadratic spin-1 chain in the critical phase hosting deconfined spinons. We demonstrate how spinon interactions can be directly probed in the presence of a magnetic field or a single-ion anisotropy. Our analytical predictions are supported by numerical matrix-product-state (MPS) simulations of the underlying microscopic model.

AI.tldr: 研究双线性-双二次自旋-1链中自旋子和向列相相关的动力学行为，通过磁场或单离子各向异性直接探测自旋子相互作用
AI.motivation: 研究临界相中具有去禁闭自旋子的自旋-1链的动力学相关行为，探索通过外部场直接探测自旋子相互作用的方法
AI.method: 结合解析理论预测和数值矩阵乘积态（MPS）模拟，在存在磁场或单离子各向异性的条件下研究微观模型
AI.result: 展示了如何通过磁场或单离子各向异性直接探测自旋子相互作用，解析预测得到了数值模拟的支持
AI.conclusion: 在双线性-双二次自旋-1链的临界相中，自旋子和向列相相关的动力学行为可以通过外部场直接探测，为研究自旋子相互作用提供了新途径

title: Damage dose dependence of deuterium retention in high-temperature self-ion irradiated tungsten
summary: Recrystallized tungsten (W) samples were irradiated by 20 MeV self-ions at 1350 K to peak damage doses in the range of 0.001-2.3 dpa. The irradiation-induced defects were then decorated with deuterium (D) by a gentle D plasma exposure ($<5$ eV/D, $5.6 \times 10^{19}$ $\text{D} / (\text{m}^2 \text{s})$) at 370 K. The D depth profiles in the samples were measured using $\rm D(^{3}He,p)α$ nuclear reaction analysis. The maximum trapped D concentration evolves differently with the damage dose compared with the previously studied irradiations at 290 K and 800 K. At the damage doses below 0.1 dpa, the D concentrations are lower than those after the irradiation at 800 K. At higher damage doses, the D concentrations exceed the 800 K values and reach 1.7 at.% at 2.3 dpa, showing no clear tendency towards saturation. Transmission electron microscopy revealed the presence of nm-sized voids in the samples irradiated at 1350 K, in contrast to the ones irradiated at 290 K and 800 K. Thermal desorption spectroscopy (TDS) indicates that the dominant D trapping sites are different compared to the irradiations at 290 K and 800 K. Reaction-diffusion simulations show that the TDS spectra can be described by assuming that D is trapped as $\rm D_2$ gas in the void volume and as D atoms at the void surface.

AI.tldr: 钨样品在1350K下进行20MeV自离子辐照，然后用氘等离子体装饰缺陷，研究不同损伤剂量下的氘捕获行为
AI.motivation: 研究高温（1350K）辐照条件下钨中缺陷的形成及其对氘捕获行为的影响，与之前290K和800K的研究结果进行对比
AI.method: 1. 在1350K下用20MeV自离子辐照再结晶钨样品；2. 用温和氘等离子体暴露（<5eV/D）在370K下装饰缺陷；3. 使用D(³He,p)α核反应分析测量氘深度分布；4. 透射电子显微镜观察纳米空洞；5. 热脱附光谱分析氘捕获位点；6. 反应扩散模拟分析TDS谱
AI.result: 1. 最大捕获氘浓度随损伤剂量的变化与290K和800K辐照不同；2. 损伤剂量低于0.1dpa时，氘浓度低于800K辐照；3. 较高损伤剂量时，氘浓度超过800K值，在2.3dpa时达到1.7at.%，未显示明显饱和趋势；4. TEM显示1350K辐照样品中存在纳米空洞，而290K和800K样品中没有；5. TDS表明主要氘捕获位点与290K和800K辐照不同；6. 反应扩散模拟表明氘以D₂气体形式捕获在空洞体积中，以D原子形式捕获在空洞表面
AI.conclusion: 高温（1350K）辐照在钨中产生纳米空洞，这些空洞成为主要的氘捕获位点，氘以D₂气体形式存在于空洞体积中，以D原子形式存在于空洞表面，这与低温辐照的缺陷捕获机制有显著不同

title: Nonmonotonic Scaling of the Anomalous Hall Effect in a Bicollinear Antiferromagnet
summary: An anomalous Hall effect (AHE) in antiferromagnetic (AF) systems with no net magnetization is of considerable interest for both fundamental physics and spintronic applications. Of particular interest is the two-dimensional van der Waals antiferromagnet FeTe that has an unusual fully magnetically compensated bicollinear AF structure and exhibits pronounced Kondo interaction leading to strong band renormalization. Here, we investigate the AHE in epitaxial FeTe thin films grown by molecular beam epitaxy. A large anomalous Hall conductivity is exhibited below the Neel temperature (T_N ~ 60 K) and, strikingly, becomes nonlinear at high fields within a narrow temperature window around 49 K, deviating from conventional AHE scaling behavior versus its longitudinal conductivity. Linear fits reveal a pronounced negative peak in the intercept, accompanied by a field-induced canted magnetic moment. The AHE responses are related to the Berry curvature derived from FeTe's topological band structure, highlighting the intricate interplay between topology, magnetism, and electronic transport.

AI.tldr: FeTe薄膜中观察到大的反常霍尔电导，在49K附近出现非线性行为，与拓扑能带结构中的贝里曲率相关
AI.motivation: 研究无净磁化的反铁磁系统中的反常霍尔效应，对基础物理和自旋电子学应用具有重要意义。FeTe具有独特的完全磁补偿双共线反铁磁结构和强Kondo相互作用，是理想的研究平台。
AI.method: 使用分子束外延生长FeTe薄膜，测量其反常霍尔效应，分析反常霍尔电导与纵向电导的关系，研究磁场诱导的倾斜磁矩。
AI.result: 在尼尔温度以下观察到大的反常霍尔电导，在49K附近的高场下出现非线性行为，偏离传统的反常霍尔效应标度关系。线性拟合显示截距出现显著的负峰，伴随磁场诱导的倾斜磁矩。
AI.conclusion: FeTe中的反常霍尔效应与其拓扑能带结构中的贝里曲率相关，揭示了拓扑、磁性和电子输运之间的复杂相互作用。

title: Third-order optical response in d-wave altermagnets: Analytical and numerical results from microscopic model
summary: Altermagnets represent a novel category of magnetic materials characterized by zero net magnetization yet featuring spin-split band structures, and they demonstrate distinctive orbital-spin locking phenomena. Commencing from the minimal multi-orbital tight-binding Hamiltonian of d-wave altermagnets, we conduct an analysis of the general formulas for the third-order injection and shift currents. These currents are solely determined by the quantum metric and quantum connection, being free from Berry curvature contamination. In the ideal scenario where the $δ$-bond hopping $V_δ$ approaches zero ($V_δ= 0$), we derive closed-form analytical solutions for the third-order photoconductivities. For the general situation with a finite value of $V_δ$, we present a perturbative analytical solution within the limit of $V_δ\ll V_π$, and this solution is verified through numerical calculations. Our research establishes a comprehensive theoretical description of the third-order optospintronic responses in d-wave altermagnets based on a microscopic model. Moreover, it offers a viable approach for the experimental observation of pure quantum geometric effects.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了d波交变磁体中的三阶光电流响应，发现注入电流和位移电流完全由量子度量和量子连接决定，不受贝里曲率污染，为实验观测纯量子几何效应提供了理论框架。
AI.motivation: 交变磁体作为新型磁性材料，具有零净磁化但自旋分裂能带结构的特性，表现出独特的轨道-自旋锁定现象。研究这些材料中的高阶光电流响应对于理解其量子几何性质具有重要意义。
AI.method: 从d波交变磁体的最小多轨道紧束缚哈密顿量出发，分析三阶注入电流和位移电流的一般公式。在理想情况(V_δ=0)下推导闭合解析解，在有限V_δ情况下给出微扰解析解(V_δ≪V_π)，并通过数值计算验证。
AI.result: 发现三阶光电流完全由量子度量和量子连接决定，不受贝里曲率污染。获得了理想情况下的闭合解析解和有限V_δ情况下的微扰解，数值计算验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 研究建立了基于微观模型的d波交变磁体三阶光自旋电子响应的完整理论描述，为实验观测纯量子几何效应提供了可行途径。

title: Role of diffusion-induced grain boundary migration during molten salt corrosion of a Ni-30Cr alloy
summary: The response of Ni-Cr alloys to exposure to molten chloride and fluoride salts is typically characterized by Cr dealloying with the formation of a Cr-depleted bi-continuous porous subsurface layer. The exact mechanism behind the loss of Cr over distances unattainable by lattice diffusion alone is still debated. To address this question, two different surface finishes, namely electropolished and sanded, of a Ni-30Cr alloy were exposed to LiCl-KCl-2wt% EuCl3 eutectic salt at 500 °C for 96 hours. In the absence of fast diffusion pathways, dissolution occurred layer by layer and was kinetically controlled by Ni dissolution, as observed over the grain interiors of the electropolished sample. Grain boundaries were subject to diffusion-induced grain boundary migration (DIGM), leading to the formation of pure Ni islands above grain boundaries. This overall behavior contrasted with the sanded surface response that was characterized by several micrometer deep interconnected porosity and complete Cr depletion. DIGM of the dense grain boundaries created by recrystallization of the sanded surface was responsible for the observed sub-surface microstructure. This work unequivocally establishes DIGM as a key mechanism in alloy molten salt corrosion, and microstructure as a decisive contributor to an alloy's corrosion response.

AI.tldr: Ni-Cr合金在熔盐腐蚀中，表面处理方式显著影响腐蚀机制：电解抛光表面为逐层溶解，而打磨表面则通过扩散诱导晶界迁移形成多孔结构
AI.motivation: 研究Ni-Cr合金在熔盐中Cr选择性溶解的深层机制，特别是超出晶格扩散范围的Cr损失现象，以及表面处理对腐蚀行为的影响
AI.method: 采用两种表面处理（电解抛光和打磨）的Ni-30Cr合金，在500°C下暴露于LiCl-KCl-2wt% EuCl3共晶盐中96小时，对比分析腐蚀行为
AI.result: 电解抛光表面呈现逐层溶解，受Ni溶解动力学控制；打磨表面形成数微米深的互连孔隙和完全Cr耗尽，扩散诱导晶界迁移是形成亚表面微观结构的关键机制
AI.conclusion: 扩散诱导晶界迁移是合金熔盐腐蚀的关键机制，合金的微观结构对其腐蚀响应具有决定性影响

title: Heating Dynamics of Mesoscopic Electron Baths at High Magnetic Field
comment: main: 6.5 pages, 4 figures; Appendix: 10 pages, 4 figures
summary: Quantum thermodynamics addresses the dynamics of heat flow in quantum devices driven out of equilibrium. Although mesoscopic circuits at low temperatures provide a flexible platform to explore this dynamics, experimental studies are wanting because thermal timescales in nanodevices are often too fast. Here we engineer and investigate with noise thermometry a mesoscopic thermal circuit where heat flows between electron, phonon and nuclear systems can occur on slower timescales. The central constituent of this device is a micrometer-scale metallic island electrically connected to large cold electron reservoirs through two to four ballistic quantum Hall channels, a component frequently used for exploring stationary thermal currents. We uncover a two-step thermalization process specific to the mesoscopic scale, involving a fast initial temperature step followed by a much slower rise extending over minutes. This observation is quantitatively accounted for by the balance between heat flows through electronic quantum channels, to cold phonons, and to the nuclear spins in the metallic island. The disclosed mesoscopic thermalization takes a step into the field of quantum thermo-\emph{dynamical} phenomena, highlighting their distinctive nature on a central constituent of quantum circuits. The implications for the thermal engineering of nanodevices include the thermal characterization of exotic states at high magnetic field.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过噪声测温技术研究了一个介观热电路，揭示了电子、声子和核自旋系统之间热流的独特两阶段热化过程，为量子热动力学现象提供了新见解。
AI.motivation: 研究量子热力学中非平衡态下的热流动力学，解决纳米器件中热时间尺度通常过快而难以实验观测的问题，探索介观尺度上独特的量子热动力学现象。
AI.method: 设计并制造了一个介观热电路，使用微米级金属岛通过2-4个弹道量子霍尔通道连接到大型冷电子库，采用噪声测温技术测量热流动力学过程。
AI.result: 观测到介观尺度特有的两阶段热化过程：快速的初始温度跃变后，接着是持续数分钟的缓慢升温。这一现象可以通过电子量子通道、冷声子和金属岛核自旋之间的热流平衡进行定量解释。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了介观热化的独特性质，为量子热动力学现象研究迈出了重要一步，对纳米器件的热工程和高磁场下奇异态的热特性表征具有重要意义。

title: Cs$_4$Cr$_7$Te$_{10}$: Interwoven Reconstructed Archimedean and Kagome Lattices with a Possible Phase Transition near 130 K
summary: Chromium-based materials with complex lattice geometries provide an important platform for investigating correlated electronic and magnetic states. However, Cr-based compounds with unusual crystal geometries are still rarely reported. Here, we report a new Cr-based compound, Cs$_4$Cr$_7$Te$_{10}$, featuring interwoven Cr and Te sublattices that can be viewed as reconstructed networks derived from Archimedean 3.4.6.4 tiling and the kagome lattice, respectively. Transport measurements reveal the semiconducting nature in Cs$_4$Cr$_7$Te$_{10}$. Magnetization measurements show a weak anisotropy between H//b and H//ac planes, and uncover an anomaly near 130 K that is insensitive to the applied magnetic fields. Specific-heat measurements further confirm this transition, indicating its bulk thermodynamic nature. The associated entropy change is as small as 0.41 J mol^-1 K^-1, ruling out a structural phase transition and pointing to a possible electronic and/or magnetic phase transition. These results provide a new route for designing complex crystal geometries and exploring their associated emergent phenomena.

AI.tldr: 报道了一种新型铬基化合物Cs₄Cr₇Te₁₀，具有复杂的交织晶格结构，表现出半导体性质和约130K的相变
AI.motivation: 铬基材料因其复杂的晶格几何结构为研究关联电子和磁态提供了重要平台，但具有非常规晶体几何结构的铬基化合物仍很少见
AI.method: 合成了新型化合物Cs₄Cr₇Te₁₀，通过结构分析发现其具有交织的Cr和Te亚晶格，分别源自阿基米德3.4.6.4铺砌和kagome晶格的重构网络；进行了输运、磁化和比热测量
AI.result: Cs₄Cr₇Te₁₀表现出半导体性质；磁化测量显示H//b和H//ac平面间存在弱各向异性，并在约130K处发现对磁场不敏感的异常；比热测量证实了该相变，熵变仅为0.41 J mol⁻¹ K⁻¹
AI.conclusion: 该相变排除了结构相变的可能性，指向可能的电子和/或磁相变；这些结果为设计复杂晶体几何结构及其相关涌现现象提供了新途径

title: Acoustically-driven magnons in CrSBr bilayers
summary: We study the coupling between spin excitations and acoustic waves in bilayers of CrSBr, an ambiently stable 2D magnetic material. We demonstrate that a strong dependence of inter-layer exchange coupling on strain makes possible the resonant generation of magnons by an acoustic wave. It is shown that the parameters of the generation, in particular the resonant frequency, can be tuned by an external magnetic field, which makes CrSBr a promising platform for spintronics applications.

AI.tldr: CrSBr双层结构中声波可共振产生磁振子，其参数可通过外磁场调控，为自旋电子学提供新平台
AI.motivation: 研究CrSBr双层结构中自旋激发与声波的耦合，探索其在自旋电子学中的应用潜力
AI.method: 通过应变调控层间交换耦合，实现声波对磁振子的共振激发
AI.result: 发现层间交换耦合对应变有强依赖性，声波可共振产生磁振子，且共振频率可通过外磁场调控
AI.conclusion: CrSBr是自旋电子学应用的理想平台，其声波-磁振子耦合特性可通过应变和磁场灵活调控

title: Topographic patterning in perovskite oxide membranes for local control of strain, nanomechanics and electronic structure
summary: Single-crystalline perovskite oxide membranes provide a powerful platform to access physical properties that are inaccessible in bulk crystals and substrate-clamped thin films. Within this context, the deliberate fabrication of tailored corrugations provides a reliable mean to impose local curvature enabling deterministic modulation of functional properties. Here, we demonstrate controlled topographic patterning in (00l)-oriented La$_{0.7}$Sr$_{0.3}$MnO$_3$ (LSMO) membranes with thicknesses ranging from 4 to 100 nm where they spontaneously form sinusoidal wrinkles with thickness-dependent periodicity and amplitude. The wrinkle morphology directly modulates membrane stiffness and generates exceptionally large local strains exceeding 5\% with strain gradients approaching $\sim$ 2.5 x 10$^{7}$ m$^{-1}$ in the thinnest membranes. These extreme deformations suppress antiferrodistortive octahedral rotations and stabilize polar distortions, evidencing a curvature-driven symmetry transformation. The surface potential variation reinforces the formation of wrinkled-induced polar patterns being strongly modulated with thickness. The variation of Mn oxidation state from $\sim$ 3.2+ to $\sim$ 2.85+ provides a direct chemical signature of a thickness-controlled electronic transition. These results demonstrate that corrugation-induced strain gradients in oxide membranes with different thicknesses can drive coupled structural, nanomechanical and electronic transformations, offering a singular route to engineer their functional states for next-generation electronic devices.

AI.tldr: 通过控制LSMO钙钛矿氧化物膜的厚度（4-100nm），可自发形成正弦皱纹结构，产生超过5%的局部应变和~2.5×10⁷ m⁻¹的应变梯度，从而抑制八面体旋转、稳定极性畸变，实现厚度调控的电子转变。
AI.motivation: 单晶钙钛矿氧化物膜为探索体材料和衬底约束薄膜中无法获得的物理性质提供了强大平台。通过设计特定的褶皱结构，可以施加局部曲率，从而确定性调控功能性质。
AI.method: 制备(00l)取向的La₀.₇Sr₀.₃MnO₃（LSMO）膜，厚度范围4-100nm，观察其自发形成的正弦皱纹结构，研究厚度相关的周期性和振幅变化，分析褶皱形态对膜刚度、局部应变和应变梯度的影响。
AI.result: 褶皱形态直接调控膜刚度，在最薄的膜中产生超过5%的局部应变和~2.5×10⁷ m⁻¹的应变梯度。这些极端变形抑制了反铁畸变八面体旋转，稳定了极性畸变，证明了曲率驱动的对称性转变。表面电势变化强化了褶皱诱导的极性图案形成，且随厚度强烈调制。Mn氧化态从~3.2+到~2.85+的变化提供了厚度控制电子转变的直接化学特征。
AI.conclusion: 不同厚度氧化物膜中褶皱诱导的应变梯度可以驱动耦合的结构、纳米力学和电子转变，为下一代电子器件中调控功能状态提供了独特途径。

title: Angle dependent hysteretic magnetotransport in MnBi2Te4 nanoflakes
summary: Controlling magnetic phases in two-dimensional systems, where charge transport is highly sensitive to real-space spin inhomogeneities, is central to understanding emergent magnetic states in reduced dimensions. In this context, thickness-dependent magnetotransport provides access to irreversible magnetic processes that are not captured by reversible transport or bulk magnetization alone. Here we report an extensive study of hysteretic magnetoresistance in single-crystalline nanoscale thin flakes of the layered antiferromagnet MnBi2Te4. The multi-step hysteresis exhibits a pronounced non-monotonic dependence on thickness and displays nontrivial angular anisotropy. The transport signatures rule out surface-dominated magnetism and simple bulk metamagnetic transitions as the primary origin. We argue that the magnetic irreversibility is possibly governed by domain wall pinning and de-pinning processes within a spatially non-uniform magnetic landscape. These results suggest that reduced dimensionality is a key driver of magnetic irreversibility in MnBi2Te4.

AI.tldr: MnBi2Te4纳米薄片磁阻研究：厚度依赖的多步磁滞现象揭示了二维系统中由畴壁钉扎/脱钉主导的磁不可逆过程
AI.motivation: 研究二维系统中磁相控制对理解降维下的涌现磁态至关重要，厚度依赖的磁输运能揭示可逆输运或体磁化无法捕捉的不可逆磁过程
AI.method: 对层状反铁磁体MnBi2Te4单晶纳米薄片进行系统的磁阻研究，分析厚度依赖的多步磁滞现象和非单调厚度依赖关系，以及非平凡的角各向异性
AI.result: 观测到多步磁滞现象，具有明显的非单调厚度依赖性和非平凡角各向异性；输运特征排除了表面主导磁性和简单体相变磁转变作为主要起源；磁不可逆性可能由空间非均匀磁景观中的畴壁钉扎和脱钉过程主导
AI.conclusion: 降维是MnBi2Te4中磁不可逆性的关键驱动因素，磁不可逆性由畴壁钉扎/脱钉过程主导，而非简单的表面磁性或体相变磁转变

title: Dynamical Poles in Non-Hermitian Impurity Scattering
summary: In Hermitian impurity scattering, each isolated late-time exponential is the fingerprint of a bound state. We show that this correspondence breaks down in non-Hermitian bands. For a single impurity in a non-Hermitian lattice, the late-time signal is controlled by isolated complex frequencies selected by the analytic continuation of the Green's function relevant to real-time dynamics, which we term dynamical poles (DPs). DPs need not coincide with static bound states: one may appear without any bound-state counterpart, while a static bound state may be dynamically invisible. The remainder of the signal is an incoherent background set by complex continuum edges. Our results establish that the real-time analytic structure of the Green's function, not the static eigenvalue problem alone, organizes non-Hermitian impurity scattering.

AI.tldr: 非厄米杂质散射中，晚期指数信号由动力学极点控制，而非静态束缚态，打破了厄米情况下的对应关系。
AI.motivation: 在厄米系统中，杂质散射的晚期指数信号与束缚态一一对应。本文旨在研究这种对应关系在非厄米能带中是否仍然成立。
AI.method: 通过分析非厄米晶格中单个杂质的格林函数，研究其实时动力学的解析结构，特别是动力学极点的作用。
AI.result: 发现动力学极点控制晚期信号，它们可能与静态束缚态不匹配：动力学极点可以没有对应的束缚态，而束缚态可能对动力学不可见。其余信号由复连续谱边缘决定。
AI.conclusion: 非厄米杂质散射的组织结构由格林函数的实时解析结构决定，而非仅由静态本征值问题决定，这打破了厄米情况下的束缚态-指数信号对应关系。

title: Order-disorder transition and Na-ion redistribution in NASICON-type Na$_3$FeCr(PO$_4$)$_3$
summary: We report the temperature-dependent synchrotron based X-ray diffraction analysis of NASICON type Na$_3$FeCr(PO$_4$)$_3$ sample, which undergoes a symmetry-lowering structural transition from a monoclinic ($C2/c$) phase with long-range Na-vacancy order to a rhombohedral ($R\bar{3}c$) phase with statistical disordered Na ions. The [FeCr(PO$_4$)$_3$] polyanionic framework remains essentially unchanged, confirming that the transition is governed by redistribution of the Na sublattice rather than by reconstruction of the host framework. The structural evolution is accompanied by a discontinuous increase in the $c$-axis and the unit-cell volume, reflecting the progressive depopulation of the Na(1) sites and transfer of Na ions toward the Na(2) sublattice. The temperature dependence of superstructure intensity found to deviate from mean-field critical behavior, instead, the experimental evolution is accurately captured by a sigmoidal phase-fraction model. The calorimetric measurements show that the enthalpy change for the first transition around 350~K is significantly larger than that of the anomaly around 445 K, indicating the dominant configurational rearrangement of Na ions occurs within the lower-temperature interval. Overall, the diffraction and calorimetric results demonstrate that Na ordering proceeds through an order-disorder transition involving intermediate Na configurations and a finite coexisting regime. The quantitative correlation between Na-vacancy ordering, lattice strain, and symmetry lowering reveals the central role of configurational interactions within the Na conduction channels in governing the phase stability of NASICON-type materials.

AI.tldr: Na₃FeCr(PO₄)₃经历从单斜有序相到菱面体无序相的结构转变，主要由Na亚晶格重排而非框架重构驱动，涉及中间态和共存区。
AI.motivation: 研究NASICON型Na₃FeCr(PO₄)₃材料中Na离子有序-无序转变的微观机制，理解Na亚晶格重排如何影响相稳定性和结构对称性变化。
AI.method: 采用温度依赖的同步辐射X射线衍射分析结构演变，结合量热测量研究相变热力学，使用相分数模型拟合超结构强度变化。
AI.result: 观察到从单斜(C2/c)有序相到菱面体(R3c)无序相的对称性降低转变，c轴和晶胞体积不连续增加，Na(1)位点逐渐去占据，Na离子向Na(2)亚晶格转移。相变偏离平均场临界行为，符合Sigmoidal相分数模型。350K附近相变焓变显著大于445K异常。
AI.conclusion: Na有序化通过涉及中间Na构型和有限共存区的有序-无序转变进行，Na空位有序、晶格应变和对称性降低之间的定量关联揭示了Na传导通道中构型相互作用在控制NASICON材料相稳定性中的核心作用。

title: Spectroscopy of Heat Transport and Violation of the Wiedemann--Franz Law in a GaAs Hydrodynamic Mesoscopic Channel
summary: The Wiedemann--Franz law, which determines the universality of the ratio of thermal conductivity to electrical conductivity, is studied in the hydrodynamic electron transport regime, where electron--electron scattering predominates over scattering by disorder. In this case, the different relaxation of electric and thermal currents can lead to a violation of the Wiedemann--Franz law, which is expected to be even more pronounced in mesoscopic electron systems. This paper reports the propagation of hot electrons in a GaAs hydrodynamic narrow channel, studied using micrometer-resolution photoluminescence thermometry. A temperature dependence of the Lorenz number was obtained, indicating a violation of the Wiedemann--Franz law. The important role of narrow constrictions in this violation was also demonstrated, and theoretical arguments are presented.

AI.tldr: 在流体动力学电子输运体系中，电子-电子散射主导无序散射时，维德曼-弗朗兹定律被违反，特别是在介观电子系统中更显著。通过微米分辨率光致发光测温技术研究GaAs流体动力学窄通道中热电子传播，获得了洛伦兹数的温度依赖性，证实了该定律的违反，并揭示了窄缩颈结构在此过程中的重要作用。
AI.motivation: 研究在流体动力学电子输运体系中维德曼-弗朗兹定律的普适性，特别是在电子-电子散射主导无序散射的情况下。由于电热电流的不同弛豫可能导致该定律的违反，这在介观电子系统中预期更为显著，因此需要实验验证这一理论预测。
AI.method: 采用微米分辨率光致发光测温技术，研究GaAs流体动力学窄通道中热电子的传播。通过实验测量获得洛伦兹数的温度依赖性，并分析窄缩颈结构对维德曼-弗朗兹定律违反的影响，同时提供理论论证支持实验结果。
AI.result: 实验获得了洛伦兹数的温度依赖性，明确表明维德曼-弗朗兹定律在流体动力学电子输运体系中被违反。研究还证明了窄缩颈结构在这一违反过程中起着重要作用，为理论预测提供了实验证据。
AI.conclusion: 在流体动力学电子输运体系中，由于电子-电子散射主导无序散射，维德曼-弗朗兹定律确实被违反，特别是在介观尺度下更为显著。窄缩颈结构在这一违反机制中扮演关键角色，这一发现对理解电子输运的基本物理规律具有重要意义。

title: Stress field modification near linear complexions increases the effective obstacle size and strengthening effect
summary: Linear complexions are stable defect states that form along dislocations and recent experiments have demonstrated strengthening effects exceeding classical precipitation hardening predictions, motivating a detailed study of nanoscale strengthening mechanisms. Here, molecular dynamics simulations in Al-Cu and Ni-Al face-centered cubic alloys are used to demonstrate distinct plasticity mechanisms associated with linear complexions. Both nanoparticle array and platelet array complexions exhibit appreciable strengthening. In addition to direct interactions with the particles, stress field modification in nearby regions can restrict dislocation motion as well. Finally, the relative particle-dislocation orientation is found to have a large effect, with the strongest resistance observed when the dislocation stress field aligns with the original complexion nucleation condition. As a whole, these findings provide mechanistic insight into the strengthening observed experimentally and establish design principles for linear complexion-induced strengthening in structural alloys.

AI.tldr: 线性复合体作为沿位错形成的稳定缺陷态，在Al-Cu和Ni-Al合金中表现出超越经典沉淀硬化预测的强化效果，分子动力学模拟揭示了其纳米尺度强化机制。
AI.motivation: 实验发现线性复合体具有超越经典沉淀硬化理论的强化效果，需要深入研究其纳米尺度强化机制，为结构合金设计提供指导。
AI.method: 采用分子动力学模拟研究Al-Cu和Ni-Al面心立方合金中的线性复合体，分析纳米颗粒阵列和片层阵列复合体的塑性变形机制。
AI.result: 两种复合体阵列均表现出显著强化效果；除了与颗粒直接相互作用外，附近区域的应力场改变也能限制位错运动；颗粒-位错相对取向对强化效果影响很大，当位错应力场与复合体成核条件一致时阻力最强。
AI.conclusion: 研究为实验观察到的强化现象提供了机制解释，并建立了线性复合体诱导强化的设计原则，对结构合金开发具有重要意义。

title: Sensitive dependence of Poor Man's Majorana modes on the length of superconductor
summary: In a hybrid system where two quantum dots (QDs) are coupled to a conventional $s$-wave superconductor, Poor Man's Majorana modes (PMMs) have been proposed. Existing theories often idealize the superconductor (SC) as a bulk system or an infinitely long chain, or treat it as another quantum dot with proximity-induced superconductivity, while experiments employ superconducting segments of finite length. Here, we model the SC as a finite-length 1D chain and treat the QDs and SC on equal footing. We obtain the conditions for the existence of PMMs, valid for arbitrary SC length and applicable to arbitrary tunneling strengths and magnetic fields. We find that the number of PMMs is highly sensitive to the SC length: it oscillates between zero and two with a period set by the Fermi wavelength ($\sim1\,\textÅ$), while four PMMs appear in the long-SC limit where the effective coupling between the two QDs becomes negligible. We further demonstrate that the PMMs that are separately localized at the two ends of the hybrid system do not exist in the finite-length case. Consequently, only nearly localized PMMs can be identified when the magnetic field is strong enough. In this way, the generalized `sweet spot' of the practical system can be found.

AI.tldr: 该研究对有限长度超导链中的Poor Man's Majorana模式进行了理论分析，揭示了SC长度对PMM数量的周期性影响，并发现有限长度系统中不存在完全局域在两端的PMM。
AI.motivation: 现有理论通常将超导体理想化为体系统或无限长链，而实验中使用的是有限长度的超导段。为了更贴近实际实验条件，需要研究有限长度超导链对Poor Man's Majorana模式的影响。
AI.method: 将超导体建模为有限长度的1D链，将量子点和超导体置于同等地位处理。推导出适用于任意SC长度、任意隧穿强度和磁场的PMM存在条件。
AI.result: PMM数量对SC长度高度敏感：在零到两个之间以费米波长（约1Å）为周期振荡，而在长SC极限下出现四个PMM。有限长度情况下不存在完全局域在系统两端的PMM，只有在磁场足够强时才能识别出近似局域的PMM。
AI.conclusion: 通过有限长度超导链模型，可以找到实际系统的广义"甜点"（sweet spot），为实验实现Poor Man's Majorana模式提供了更准确的理论指导。

title: Two-Dimensional Ferromagnetism in Monolayers of MnSi
summary: 2D ferromagnets offer valuable insights into the fundamentals of magnetism and stimulate the progress of ultracompact spintronics. The demand for seamless integration of the materials with the Si technology, particularly helpful to their applications in nanoelectronics, draws attention to 2D magnetic silicides. MnSi is a prominent silicide hosting magnetic phases with unconventional properties; however, little is known about magnetic states of MnSi at the 2D limit. Here, we explore the magnetism of ultrathin films of MnSi on silicon, down to a single monolayer. Angle-resolved photoemission spectra suggest exchange splitting of MnSi bands. Magnetization measurements confirm that the ferromagnetic state in MnSi is rather robust with respect to the number of monolayers. Thick metallic films demonstrate the anomalous Hall effect and negative magnetoresistance; however, as the number of monolayers drops below 3, MnSi becomes an insulator. Most importantly, the ferromagnetism of ultrathin MnSi films acquires a 2D character, as its effective Curie temperature depends on weak magnetic fields. The present study establishes MnSi monolayers as 2D ferromagnets that can find potential applications in silicon-based spintronics.

AI.tldr: 该研究探索了MnSi单层薄膜的磁性，发现其在二维极限下仍保持铁磁性，并表现出二维特性，为硅基自旋电子学提供了潜在应用。
AI.motivation: 二维铁磁体对理解磁学基本原理和推动超紧凑自旋电子学发展很重要。将磁性材料与硅技术集成对于纳米电子学应用尤为关键，因此需要研究二维磁性硅化物，特别是MnSi在二维极限下的磁性状态。
AI.method: 研究采用角度分辨光电子能谱分析MnSi能带的交换分裂，通过磁化测量验证不同层数MnSi薄膜的铁磁稳定性，测量反常霍尔效应和磁阻，并分析有效居里温度对弱磁场的依赖性。
AI.result: MnSi薄膜在单层极限下仍保持铁磁性，但厚度低于3层时变为绝缘体。二维MnSi的铁磁性表现出二维特性，其有效居里温度依赖于弱磁场。厚金属薄膜显示反常霍尔效应和负磁阻。
AI.conclusion: MnSi单层薄膜被确立为二维铁磁体，具有硅基自旋电子学应用的潜力，为二维磁性材料与硅技术的集成提供了重要进展。

title: Exact demagnetisation field for periodic one-dimensional array of rectangular prisms
summary: The magnetic field from a uniformly magnetised, rectangular prism is known exactly, which is the basis for a large number of micromagnetic simulations. Here we derive an analytical solution for the field from a periodically repeating infinite array of prisms aligned end-to-end, which becomes exact on the center axis in the limit of infinitesimally thin prisms. Using the same method we derive the on-axis field for a one-dimensional array of point dipoles. We validate the obtained results numerically and furthermore compare with the common macrogeometry approach and more recent uniform magnetisation method, demonstrating an excellent convergence rate for the novel method.

AI.tldr: 推导了无限周期排列矩形棱柱阵列在中心轴上的精确磁场解析解，验证了该方法优于传统宏观几何方法和均匀磁化方法
AI.motivation: 虽然均匀磁化矩形棱柱的磁场已有精确解，但周期性无限阵列的磁场解析解尚未得到，这对于微磁模拟具有重要意义
AI.method: 推导了无限周期排列矩形棱柱阵列在中心轴上的解析解，并采用相同方法推导了一维点偶极子阵列的轴上磁场
AI.result: 获得了精确的解析解，数值验证显示该方法收敛性优异，优于常见的宏观几何方法和均匀磁化方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的新方法为周期性磁结构提供了精确高效的磁场计算方案，在微磁模拟中具有重要应用价值

title: Piezomagnetic Switching of Nonvolatile Antiferromagnetic States
summary: Prospective spintronic memory and logic devices will benefit from the negligible stray field and ultrafast magnetic dynamics inherent to antiferromagnets [1]. However, realizing isothermal, nonvolatile,and deterministic switching of antiferromagnetic states remains a key challenge [2, 3]. Here,we propose a piezomagnetic writing scheme in triangular Mn3Ir-based memory cells, with readout achieved via the exchange bias effect. Our approach enables deterministic and nonvolatile switching of the antiferromagnetic states, which exhibit exceptional robustness against external perturbations.The switching mechanism is ascribed to piezomagnetic effect of Mn3Ir combined with the interfacial Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction at the antiferromagnet-ferromagnet interface. This scheme overomes the speed limitations imposed by conventional isothermal methods based on isothermal crystallization mechanism [4]. Our findings highlight the potential of piezomagnetic effects in designing advanced spintronic devices, providing an efficient pathway for manipulating antiferromagnetic states and developing energy-efficient memory technology.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于压磁效应的反铁磁存储器写入方案，使用Mn3Ir材料实现确定性、非易失性的反铁磁状态切换，并通过交换偏置效应进行读取。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁材料具有零杂散场和超快磁动力学的优势，但实现等温、非易失性和确定性的反铁磁状态切换仍然是一个关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于三角形Mn3Ir存储单元的压磁写入方案，结合反铁磁-铁磁界面的Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用，通过压磁效应实现状态切换，并通过交换偏置效应进行读取。
AI.result: 该方法实现了反铁磁状态的确定性和非易失性切换，具有对外部扰动的优异鲁棒性，克服了传统等温方法的速度限制。
AI.conclusion: 压磁效应在先进自旋电子器件设计中具有巨大潜力，为操纵反铁磁状态和开发高能效存储技术提供了有效途径。

title: Evidence for Umklapp electron scattering emission from metal photocathodes
summary: Comparison of the measured spectral emission properties of single-crystal Cu(001) and W(111) photocathodes to established photoemission theories reveal evidence for an additional one photon emission process predominantly affecting electron emission near and below the photoemission threshold. This additional photoemission process is postulated to be due to a momentum-resonant Franck-Condon mechanism mediated by inelastic Umklapp electron scattering. An initial first-principles simulation of this emission process (involving the electron thermal effective mass, the inelastic electron mean free path at the vacuum level, and the number of Fermi surfaces in the metal), when combined with a direct one-step band emission model, is consistent with the measured spectral dependencies of both the quantum efficiency and mean transverse energy of electron photoemission from the two single-crystal metal photocathodes.

AI.tldr: 在Cu(001)和W(111)单晶光电阴极的光谱发射特性测量中发现，在光发射阈值附近及以下存在额外的单光子发射过程，这不能用现有光发射理论解释。
AI.motivation: 现有光发射理论无法完全解释单晶金属光电阴极在阈值附近的光谱发射特性，需要探索新的物理机制来解释观测到的异常发射现象。
AI.method: 通过测量Cu(001)和W(111)单晶光电阴极的光谱发射特性，并与现有光发射理论对比，提出动量共振Franck-Condon机制，并通过第一性原理模拟结合直接一步带发射模型进行分析。
AI.result: 实验发现存在额外的单光子发射过程，该过程由非弹性Umklapp电子散射介导的动量共振Franck-Condon机制解释。结合第一性原理模拟的模型能够一致地解释两个单晶金属光电阴极的量子效率和平均横向能量的光谱依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 在金属光电阴极的光发射阈值附近存在新的单光子发射机制，这一发现对理解金属表面的光电子发射物理具有重要意义，并为光电阴极性能优化提供了新思路。
